```text
469	    /// Detect Ongoing → ended transitions and arm the confetti burst for the
470	    /// next draw. Called automatically at the end of `dispatch` (Local) and
471	    /// `tick_net` (Net); rematches that move from Won/Drawn → Ongoing are
472	    /// silent (we update the remembered status without firing).
473	    fn note_status_transition(&mut self, cur: Option<GameStatus>, is_net: bool) {
474	        let prev = if is_net { self.prev_status_net } else { self.prev_status_local };
475	        let was_ongoing = matches!(prev, Some(GameStatus::Ongoing));
476	        let now_ended =
477	            matches!(cur, Some(GameStatus::Won { .. }) | Some(GameStatus::Drawn { .. }));
478	        if was_ongoing && now_ended && self.show_confetti {
479	            self.confetti_pending = true;
480	        }
481	        if is_net {
482	            self.prev_status_net = cur;
483	        } else {
484	            self.prev_status_local = cur;
485	        }
486	    }
487	
488	    fn current_local_status(&self) -> Option<GameStatus> {
489	        match &self.screen {
490	            Screen::Game(g) => Some(g.state.status),
491	            _ => None,
492	        }
493	    }
494	
495	    fn current_net_status(&self) -> Option<GameStatus> {
496	        match &self.screen {
497	            Screen::Net(n) => n.last_view.as_ref().map(|v| v.status),
498	            _ => None,
499	        }
500	    }
501	
502	    /// Replace `self` with `fresh` while preserving the user's FX prefs
503	    /// (`show_confetti`, `show_check_banner`). Constructors always default
504	    /// FX to ON; this helper carries the user's actual choices across screen
505	    /// transitions like `NewGame` → picker, lobby → game, etc. Tracking
506	    /// state (`prev_status_*`, active `confetti_anim`) is reset because the
507	    /// new screen is starting fresh.
508	    fn replace_preserving_prefs(&mut self, fresh: AppState) {
509	        let confetti = self.show_confetti;
510	        let check = self.show_check_banner;
511	        let captured_sort = self.captured_sort;
512	        *self = fresh;
513	        self.show_confetti = confetti;
514	        self.show_check_banner = check;
515	        self.captured_sort = captured_sort;
516	    }
517	
518	    /// Drain ws events from the worker thread(s) and apply them to the
519	    /// active `NetView` / `LobbyView`. Called once per main-loop tick
520	    /// (no-op outside Net / Lobby modes).
521	    pub fn tick_net(&mut self) {
522	        match &mut self.screen {
523	            Screen::Net(n) => {
524	                while let Ok(evt) = n.client.evt_rx.try_recv() {
525	                    apply_net_event(n, evt);
526	                }
527	            }
528	            Screen::Lobby(l) => {
529	                while let Ok(evt) = l.client.evt_rx.try_recv() {
530	                    apply_lobby_event(l, evt);
531	                }
532	            }
533	            _ => {}
534	        }
535	        // Server pushes can change the game outcome at any time; check after
536	        // every drained batch so the next draw sees the confetti flag.
537	        let cur = self.current_net_status();
538	        self.note_status_transition(cur, true);
539	    }
540	
541	    /// Compute the input mode for the current screen so main.rs can drive
542	    /// `from_key` without poking at private state.
543	    pub fn input_mode(&self) -> InputMode {
544	        match &self.screen {
545	            Screen::Picker(_) => InputMode::Picker,
546	            Screen::Lobby(l) => {
547	                if l.pending_join.is_some() {
548	                    InputMode::Text
549	                } else {
550	                    InputMode::Lobby
551	                }
552	            }
553	            Screen::HostPrompt(_) | Screen::CreateRoom(_) => InputMode::Text,
554	            // While typing a chat line or a coord move, hijack the keymap so
555	            // printable chars append to the buffer instead of moving the cursor.
556	            Screen::Net(n) if n.chat_input.is_some() || n.coord_input.is_some() => InputMode::Text,
557	            Screen::Game(g) if g.coord_input.is_some() => InputMode::Text,
558	            Screen::Game(_) | Screen::Net(_) => InputMode::Game,
559	        }
560	    }
561	
562	    pub fn dispatch(&mut self, action: Action) {
563	        match action {
564	            Action::None => {}
565	            Action::ConfirmYes => {
566	                self.quit_confirm_open = false;
567	                self.should_quit = true;
568	            }
569	            Action::ConfirmNo => self.quit_confirm_open = false,
570	            Action::Quit => {
571	                if self.is_game_in_progress() {
572	                    self.quit_confirm_open = true;
573	                } else {
574	                    self.should_quit = true;
575	                }
576	            }
577	            Action::HelpToggle => self.help_open = !self.help_open,
578	            Action::RulesToggle => self.rules_open = !self.rules_open,
579	            Action::CapturedSortToggle => {
580	                self.captured_sort = self.captured_sort.toggled();
581	                let msg = format!("Captured sort: {}", self.captured_sort.label());
582	                match &mut self.screen {
583	                    Screen::Game(g) => g.last_msg = Some(msg),
584	                    Screen::Net(n) => n.last_msg = Some(msg),
585	                    _ => {}
586	                }
587	            }
588	            Action::NewGame => {
589	                if matches!(self.screen, Screen::Net(_)) {
590	                    // In Net mode, 'n' requests a rematch via the server
591	                    // instead of dropping the connection. Game must be over.
592	                    if let Screen::Net(n) = &mut self.screen {
593	                        if !n.role.map(|r| r.is_player()).unwrap_or(false) {
594	                            n.last_msg = Some("Spectators cannot request a rematch.".into());
595	                            return;
596	                        }
597	                        let status = n.last_view.as_ref().map(|v| v.status);
598	                        match status {
599	                            Some(GameStatus::Won { .. }) | Some(GameStatus::Drawn { .. }) => {
600	                                let _ = n.client.cmd_tx.send(ClientMsg::Rematch);
601	                                n.last_msg =
602	                                    Some("Rematch requested. Waiting for opponent…".into());
603	                            }
604	                            Some(GameStatus::Ongoing) => {
605	                                n.last_msg = Some(
606	                                    "'n' requests a rematch only after the game is over.".into(),
607	                                );
608	                            }
609	                            None => {
610	                                n.last_msg = Some("Not connected yet.".into());
611	                            }
612	                        }
613	                    }
614	                } else {
615	                    let style = self.style;
616	                    let use_color = self.use_color;
617	                    let observer = self.observer;
618	                    self.replace_preserving_prefs(AppState::new_picker(style, use_color, observer));
619	                }
620	            }
621	            Action::Back => self.dispatch_back(),
622	            Action::PickerUp | Action::PickerDown | Action::PickerSelect => match &self.screen {
623	                Screen::Picker(_) => self.dispatch_picker(action),
624	                Screen::Lobby(_) => self.dispatch_lobby(action),
625	                _ => {}
626	            },
627	            Action::LobbyCreate | Action::LobbyRefresh => {
628	                if matches!(self.screen, Screen::Lobby(_)) {
629	                    self.dispatch_lobby(action);
630	                }
631	            }
632	            Action::TextInput(_)
633	            | Action::TextBackspace
634	            | Action::FocusNext
635	            | Action::FocusPrev
636	            | Action::Submit => self.dispatch_text(action),
637	            Action::ChatStart => self.dispatch_chat_start(),
638	            Action::CoordStart(kind) => self.dispatch_coord_start(kind),
639	            Action::LobbyWatch => {
640	                if matches!(self.screen, Screen::Lobby(_)) {
641	                    self.dispatch_lobby_watch();
642	                }
643	            }
644	            _ => match &self.screen {
645	                Screen::Net(_) => self.dispatch_net(action),
646	                Screen::Game(_) => self.dispatch_game(action),
647	                Screen::Picker(_)
648	                | Screen::HostPrompt(_)
649	                | Screen::Lobby(_)
650	                | Screen::CreateRoom(_) => {}
651	            },
652	        }
653	        // Local moves go through dispatch_game / dispatch_coord_*, both of
654	        // which can land us on a terminal status. Re-check after every
655	        // dispatch so the confetti trigger fires reliably regardless of the
656	        // entry path. Net status is checked separately in `tick_net`.
657	        let cur = self.current_local_status();
658	        self.note_status_transition(cur, false);
659	    }
660	
661	    fn dispatch_back(&mut self) {
662	        let style = self.style;
663	        let use_color = self.use_color;
664	        let observer = self.observer;
665	        match &mut self.screen {
666	            Screen::HostPrompt(_) => {
667	                self.replace_preserving_prefs(AppState::new_picker(style, use_color, observer));
668	            }
669	            Screen::Lobby(l) => {
670	                if l.pending_join.is_some() {
671	                    l.pending_join = None;
672	                    l.last_msg = None;
673	                    return;
674	                }
675	                self.replace_preserving_prefs(AppState::new_picker(style, use_color, observer));
676	            }
677	            Screen::CreateRoom(c) => {
678	                let host = c.host.clone();
679	                self.replace_preserving_prefs(AppState::new_lobby(
680	                    host, style, use_color, observer,
681	                ));
682	            }
683	            // Esc inside Game / Net while a coord-input prompt is open: close
684	            // the prompt and (Live mode only) restore the snapshotted cursor +
685	            // selected highlight that existed before the prompt was opened.
686	            Screen::Game(g) if g.coord_input.is_some() => {
687	                let ci = g.coord_input.take().expect("guarded by is_some");
688	                if let Some((cur, sel)) = ci.snapshot {
689	                    g.cursor = cur;
690	                    g.selected = sel;
691	                }
692	                g.last_msg = None;
693	            }
694	            Screen::Net(n) if n.coord_input.is_some() => {
695	                let ci = n.coord_input.take().expect("guarded by is_some");
696	                if let Some((cur, sel)) = ci.snapshot {
697	                    n.cursor = cur;
698	                    n.selected = sel;
699	                }
700	                n.last_msg = None;
701	            }
702	            // Esc inside Net mode — if we're typing a chat line, cancel the
703	            // input rather than navigating away.
704	            Screen::Net(n) if n.chat_input.is_some() => {
705	                n.chat_input = None;
706	                n.last_msg = None;
707	            }
708	            _ => {}
709	        }
710	    }
711	
712	    fn dispatch_chat_start(&mut self) {
713	        let Screen::Net(n) = &mut self.screen else {
714	            return;
715	        };
716	        if n.coord_input.is_some() {
717	            n.last_msg = Some("Finish or cancel coord-input (Esc) before chat.".into());
718	            return;
719	        }
720	        match n.role {
721	            Some(NetRole::Player(_)) => {
722	                n.chat_input = Some(String::new());
723	                n.last_msg = Some("Chat: type a line, Enter sends, Esc cancels.".into());
724	            }
725	            Some(NetRole::Spectator) => {
726	                n.last_msg = Some("Spectators can read but not chat.".into());
727	            }
728	            None => {
729	                n.last_msg = Some("Not connected yet.".into());
730	            }
731	        }
732	    }
733	
734	    fn dispatch_coord_start(&mut self, kind: CoordKind) {
735	        let msg = coord_help_msg(kind);
736	        match &mut self.screen {
737	            Screen::Game(g) => {
738	                let snapshot = matches!(kind, CoordKind::Live).then_some((g.cursor, g.selected));
739	                if matches!(kind, CoordKind::Live) {
740	                    g.selected = None;
741	                }
742	                g.coord_input = Some(CoordInputState { kind, buf: String::new(), snapshot });
743	                g.last_msg = Some(msg);
744	            }
745	            Screen::Net(n) => {
746	                if n.chat_input.is_some() {
747	                    n.last_msg = Some("Finish or cancel chat (Esc) before move-input.".into());
748	                    return;
749	                }
750	                match n.role {
751	                    Some(NetRole::Player(_)) => {}
752	                    Some(NetRole::Spectator) => {
753	                        n.last_msg = Some("Spectators cannot move.".into());
754	                        return;
755	                    }
756	                    None => {
757	                        n.last_msg = Some("Not connected yet.".into());
758	                        return;
759	                    }
760	                }
761	                let snapshot = matches!(kind, CoordKind::Live).then_some((n.cursor, n.selected));
762	                if matches!(kind, CoordKind::Live) {
763	                    n.selected = None;
764	                }
765	                n.coord_input = Some(CoordInputState { kind, buf: String::new(), snapshot });
766	                n.last_msg = Some(msg);
767	            }
768	            _ => {}
769	        }
770	    }
771	
772	    fn dispatch_lobby_watch(&mut self) {
773	        let Screen::Lobby(l) = &mut self.screen else {
774	            return;
775	        };
776	        if l.pending_join.is_some() || l.rooms.is_empty() {
777	            return;
778	        }
779	        let cursor = l.cursor.min(l.rooms.len() - 1);
780	        let room = l.rooms[cursor].clone();
781	        if room.has_password {
782	            // Spectator joins to locked rooms still need the password.
783	            l.pending_join = Some(PendingJoin {
784	                room_id: room.id,
785	                password_buf: String::new(),
786	                as_spectator: true,
787	            });
788	            l.last_msg = Some("Type password to spectate, Enter to join, Esc to cancel.".into());
789	            return;
790	        }
791	        let host = l.host.clone();
792	        let style = self.style;
793	        let use_color = self.use_color;
794	        let url = format!("{host}/ws/{}?role=spectator", room.id);
795	        self.replace_preserving_prefs(AppState::new_net(url, style, use_color));
796	    }
797	
798	    fn is_game_in_progress(&self) -> bool {
799	        match &self.screen {
800	            Screen::Game(g) => {
801	                matches!(g.state.status, GameStatus::Ongoing) && !g.state.history.is_empty()
802	            }
803	            Screen::Net(n) => match &n.last_view {
804	                Some(view) => matches!(view.status, GameStatus::Ongoing) && n.connected,
805	                None => false,
806	            },
807	            Screen::Picker(_)
808	            | Screen::HostPrompt(_)
809	            | Screen::Lobby(_)
810	            | Screen::CreateRoom(_) => false,
811	        }
812	    }
813	
814	    fn dispatch_picker(&mut self, action: Action) {
815	        let Screen::Picker(p) = &mut self.screen else {
816	            return;
817	        };
818	        let n = PickerEntry::ALL.len();
819	        match action {
820	            Action::PickerUp => p.cursor = (p.cursor + n - 1) % n,
821	            Action::PickerDown => p.cursor = (p.cursor + 1) % n,
822	            Action::PickerSelect => {
823	                let entry = PickerEntry::ALL[p.cursor];
824	                let observer = self.observer;
825	                let style = self.style;
826	                let use_color = self.use_color;
827	                match entry {
828	                    PickerEntry::ConnectToServer => {
829	                        self.replace_preserving_prefs(AppState::new_host_prompt(
830	                            style, use_color, observer,
831	                        ));
832	                    }
833	                    PickerEntry::Quit => self.should_quit = true,
834	                    other => {
835	                        if let Some(rules) = other.rules() {
836	                            self.replace_preserving_prefs(AppState::new_game(
837	                                rules, style, use_color, observer,
838	                            ));
839	                        }
840	                    }
841	                }
842	            }
843	            _ => {}
844	        }
845	    }
846	
847	    fn dispatch_lobby(&mut self, action: Action) {
848	        let Screen::Lobby(l) = &mut self.screen else {
849	            return;
850	        };
851	        // Pending password prompt eats list-cursor inputs.
852	        if l.pending_join.is_some() {
853	            return;
854	        }
855	        match action {
856	            Action::PickerUp if !l.rooms.is_empty() => {
857	                l.cursor = (l.cursor + l.rooms.len() - 1) % l.rooms.len();
858	            }
859	            Action::PickerDown if !l.rooms.is_empty() => {
860	                l.cursor = (l.cursor + 1) % l.rooms.len();
861	            }
862	            Action::PickerSelect => {
863	                if l.rooms.is_empty() {
864	                    l.last_msg =
865	                        Some("No rooms yet. Press 'c' to create one, or 'r' to refresh.".into());
866	                    return;
867	                }
868	                let cursor = l.cursor.min(l.rooms.len() - 1);
869	                let room = l.rooms[cursor].clone();
870	                if room.seats >= 2 {
871	                    l.last_msg = Some(format!("Room '{}' is full (2/2).", room.id));
872	                    return;
873	                }
874	                if room.has_password {
875	                    l.pending_join = Some(PendingJoin {
876	                        room_id: room.id,
877	                        password_buf: String::new(),
878	                        as_spectator: false,
879	                    });
880	                    l.last_msg = Some("Type password, Enter to join, Esc to cancel.".into());
881	                    return;
882	                }
883	                let host = l.host.clone();
884	                let style = self.style;
885	                let use_color = self.use_color;
886	                self.replace_preserving_prefs(AppState::new_net(
887	                    format!("{host}/ws/{}", room.id),
888	                    style,
889	                    use_color,
890	                ));
891	            }
892	            Action::LobbyCreate => {
893	                let host = l.host.clone();
894	                self.screen = Screen::CreateRoom(CreateRoomView {
895	                    host,
896	                    id_buf: String::new(),
897	                    password_buf: String::new(),
898	                    focus: CreateRoomField::Id,
899	                    error: None,
900	                });
901	            }
902	            Action::LobbyRefresh => {
903	                let _ = l.client.cmd_tx.send(ClientMsg::ListRooms);
904	                l.last_msg = Some("Refresh requested.".into());
905	            }
906	            _ => {}
907	        }
908	    }
909	
910	    fn dispatch_text(&mut self, action: Action) {
911	        match &mut self.screen {
912	            Screen::HostPrompt(h) => match action {
913	                Action::TextInput(c) => text_input::push_char(&mut h.buf, c, 128),
914	                Action::TextBackspace => text_input::backspace(&mut h.buf),
915	                Action::Submit => {
916	                    let raw = h.buf.trim().to_string();
917	                    let host = match normalize_host_url(&raw) {
918	                        Ok(u) => u,
919	                        Err(e) => {
920	                            h.error = Some(e);
921	                            return;
922	                        }
923	                    };
924	                    let style = self.style;
925	                    let use_color = self.use_color;
926	                    let observer = self.observer;
927	                    self.replace_preserving_prefs(AppState::new_lobby(
928	                        host, style, use_color, observer,
929	                    ));
930	                }
931	                _ => {}
932	            },
933	            Screen::CreateRoom(c) => match action {
934	                Action::TextInput(ch) => match c.focus {
935	                    CreateRoomField::Id => text_input::push_char(&mut c.id_buf, ch, 32),
936	                    CreateRoomField::Password => text_input::push_char(&mut c.password_buf, ch, 64),
937	                    CreateRoomField::Submit => {
938	                        if matches!(ch, ' ' | '\n') {
939	                            self.dispatch_text(Action::Submit);
940	                        }
941	                    }
942	                },
943	                Action::TextBackspace => match c.focus {
944	                    CreateRoomField::Id => text_input::backspace(&mut c.id_buf),
945	                    CreateRoomField::Password => text_input::backspace(&mut c.password_buf),
946	                    _ => {}
947	                },
948	                Action::FocusNext => {
949	                    c.focus = match c.focus {
950	                        CreateRoomField::Id => CreateRoomField::Password,
951	                        CreateRoomField::Password => CreateRoomField::Submit,
952	                        CreateRoomField::Submit => CreateRoomField::Id,
953	                    };
954	                }
955	                Action::FocusPrev => {
956	                    c.focus = match c.focus {
957	                        CreateRoomField::Id => CreateRoomField::Submit,
958	                        CreateRoomField::Password => CreateRoomField::Id,
959	                        CreateRoomField::Submit => CreateRoomField::Password,
960	                    };
961	                }
962	                Action::Submit => {
963	                    let id = c.id_buf.trim().to_string();
964	                    if !valid_room_id(&id) {
965	                        c.error = Some("Room id must be 1–32 chars of [a-zA-Z0-9_-].".into());
966	                        return;
967	                    }
968	                    let host = c.host.clone();
969	                    let password =
970	                        if c.password_buf.is_empty() { None } else { Some(c.password_buf.clone()) };
971	                    let url = match password {
972	                        Some(pw) => format!("{host}/ws/{id}?password={}", urlencode(&pw)),
973	                        None => format!("{host}/ws/{id}"),
974	                    };
975	                    let style = self.style;
976	                    let use_color = self.use_color;
977	                    self.replace_preserving_prefs(AppState::new_net(url, style, use_color));
978	                }
979	                _ => {}
980	            },
981	            Screen::Lobby(l) => {
982	                let Some(pj) = l.pending_join.as_mut() else {
983	                    return;
984	                };
985	                match action {
986	                    Action::TextInput(c) => text_input::push_char(&mut pj.password_buf, c, 64),
987	                    Action::TextBackspace => text_input::backspace(&mut pj.password_buf),
988	                    Action::Submit => {
989	                        let host = l.host.clone();
990	                        let pj_owned = l.pending_join.take().unwrap();
991	                        let mut url = format!(
992	                            "{host}/ws/{}?password={}",
993	                            pj_owned.room_id,
994	                            urlencode(&pj_owned.password_buf)
995	                        );
996	                        if pj_owned.as_spectator {
997	                            url.push_str("&role=spectator");
998	                        }
999	                        let style = self.style;
1000	                        let use_color = self.use_color;
1001	                        self.replace_preserving_prefs(AppState::new_net(url, style, use_color));
1002	                    }
1003	                    _ => {}
1004	                }
1005	            }
1006	            // Game mode hijacks Text input while the user is typing a coord
1007	            // move (`:` instant or `m` live preview). Submit applies the move;
1008	            // Esc / Back closes (and Live mode restores the snapshot).
1009	            Screen::Game(g) if g.coord_input.is_some() => {
1010	                let observer = self.observer;
1011	                Self::dispatch_coord_text_game(g, action, observer);
1012	            }
1013	            // Net mode: coord-input takes priority over chat-input (mutual
1014	            // exclusion is enforced at start time), so check coord first.
1015	            Screen::Net(n) => {
1016	                if n.coord_input.is_some() {
1017	                    dispatch_coord_text_net(n, action);
1018	                } else if n.chat_input.is_some() {
1019	                    let buf = n.chat_input.as_mut().expect("guarded by is_some");
1020	                    match action {
1021	                        Action::TextInput(c) => text_input::push_char(buf, c, CHAT_INPUT_MAX),
1022	                        Action::TextBackspace => text_input::backspace(buf),
1023	                        Action::Submit => {
1024	                            let buf = n.chat_input.take().unwrap_or_default();
1025	                            let trimmed = buf.trim();
1026	                            if trimmed.is_empty() {
1027	                                n.last_msg = Some("Empty chat — nothing sent.".into());
1028	                                return;
1029	                            }
1030	                            let _ =
1031	                                n.client.cmd_tx.send(ClientMsg::Chat { text: trimmed.to_string() });
1032	                            n.last_msg = Some("Chat sent.".into());
1033	                        }
1034	                        _ => {}
1035	                    }
1036	                }
1037	            }
1038	            _ => {}
1039	        }
1040	    }
1041	
1042	    fn dispatch_coord_text_game(g: &mut GameView, action: Action, observer: Side) {
1043	        // Pull `kind` and the buf-edit decisions out before we re-borrow `g`
1044	        // for the live-preview / submit path.
1045	        let Some(ci) = g.coord_input.as_mut() else {
1046	            return;
1047	        };
1048	        let kind = ci.kind;
1049	        match action {
1050	            Action::TextInput(c) => {
1051	                text_input::push_char(&mut ci.buf, c, COORD_INPUT_MAX);
1052	                if matches!(kind, CoordKind::Live) {
1053	                    live_preview_game(g, observer);
1054	                }
1055	            }
1056	            Action::TextBackspace => {
1057	                text_input::backspace(&mut ci.buf);
1058	                if matches!(kind, CoordKind::Live) {
1059	                    live_preview_game(g, observer);
1060	                }
1061	            }
1062	            Action::Submit => {
1063	                let buf = std::mem::take(&mut ci.buf);
1064	                match chess_core::notation::iccs::decode_move(&g.state, buf.trim()) {
1065	                    Ok(mv) => {
1066	                        g.coord_input = None;
1067	                        Self::apply_move(g, mv);
1068	                    }
1069	                    Err(e) => {
1070	                        if let Some(ci) = g.coord_input.as_mut() {
1071	                            ci.buf = buf;
1072	                        }
1073	                        g.last_msg = Some(format!("Bad move: {e}"));
1074	                    }
1075	                }
1076	            }
1077	            _ => {}
1078	        }
1079	    }
1080	
1081	    fn dispatch_game(&mut self, action: Action) {
1082	        let Screen::Game(g) = &mut self.screen else {
1083	            return;
1084	        };
1085	        let shape = g.state.board.shape();
1086	        let (rows, cols) = orient::display_dims(shape);
1087	        match action {
1088	            Action::CursorUp if g.cursor.0 > 0 => {
1089	                g.cursor.0 -= 1;
1090	            }
1091	            Action::CursorDown if g.cursor.0 + 1 < rows => {
1092	                g.cursor.0 += 1;
1093	            }
1094	            Action::CursorLeft if g.cursor.1 > 0 => {
1095	                g.cursor.1 -= 1;
1096	            }
1097	            Action::CursorRight if g.cursor.1 + 1 < cols => {
1098	                g.cursor.1 += 1;
1099	            }
1100	            Action::Cancel => {
1101	                if let Some(at) = g.state.chain_lock {
1102	                    // Engine is in 連吃 mode — Esc ends the chain.
1103	                    Self::apply_move(g, Move::EndChain { at });
1104	                } else {
1105	                    g.selected = None;
1106	                    g.last_msg = None;
1107	                }
1108	            }
1109	            Action::SelectOrCommit => {
1110	                let observer = self.observer;
1111	                Self::handle_select_or_commit(g, observer);
1112	            }
1113	            Action::Undo => match g.state.unmake_move() {
1114	                Ok(()) => {
1115	                    g.state.refresh_status();
1116	                    g.selected = None;
1117	                    g.last_msg = Some(format!("Undone. {:?} to move.", g.state.side_to_move));
1118	                }
1119	                Err(e) => {
1120	                    g.last_msg = Some(format!("Cannot undo: {e}"));
1121	                }
1122	            },
1123	            Action::Flip => {
1124	                if !matches!(g.state.status, chess_core::state::GameStatus::Ongoing) {
1125	                    g.last_msg = Some(
1126	                        "Game over. Press 'n' for new game, 'u' to take back, 'q' to quit.".into(),
1127	                    );
1128	                    return;
1129	                }
1130	                let observer = self.observer;
1131	                let Some(sq) = orient::square_at_display(g.cursor.0, g.cursor.1, observer, shape)
1132	                else {
1133	                    g.last_msg = Some("Cursor not on a playable square.".into());
1134	                    return;
1135	                };
1136	                let m = Move::Reveal { at: sq, revealed: None };
1137	                Self::apply_move(g, m);
1138	            }
1139	            Action::Click { term_col, term_row } => {
1140	                if let Some(rect) = self.board_rect {
1141	                    let observer = self.observer;
1142	                    if let Some((row, col)) = hit_test(rect, term_col, term_row, rows, cols) {
1143	                        g.cursor = (row, col);
1144	                        Self::handle_select_or_commit(g, observer);
1145	                    }
1146	                }
1147	            }
1148	            _ => {}
1149	        }
1150	    }
1151	
1152	    fn handle_select_or_commit(g: &mut GameView, observer: Side) {
1153	        if !matches!(g.state.status, chess_core::state::GameStatus::Ongoing) {
1154	            g.last_msg =
1155	                Some("Game over. Press 'n' for new game, 'u' to take back, 'q' to quit.".into());
1156	            return;
1157	        }
1158	        let shape = g.state.board.shape();
1159	        let Some(sq) = orient::square_at_display(g.cursor.0, g.cursor.1, observer, shape) else {
1160	            g.last_msg = Some("Cursor not on a playable square.".into());
1161	            return;
1162	        };
1163	
1164	        let view = PlayerView::project(&g.state, g.state.side_to_move);
1165	
1166	        // Engine chain mode: only the locked piece may move (captures
1167	        // only). Press Enter on the locked piece to end the chain.
1168	        if let Some(locked) = view.chain_lock {
1169	            if sq == locked {
1170	                Self::apply_move(g, Move::EndChain { at: locked });
1171	                return;
1172	            }
1173	            let candidate = view
1174	                .legal_moves
1175	                .iter()
1176	                .find(|m| m.origin_square() == locked && m.to_square() == Some(sq))
1177	                .cloned();
1178	            match candidate {
1179	                Some(m) => Self::apply_move(g, m),
1180	                None => {
1181	                    g.last_msg = Some(
1182	                        "連吃 active — capture from the locked piece, or press Enter on it to end."
1183	                            .into(),
1184	                    )
1185	                }
1186	            }
1187	            return;
1188	        }
1189	
1190	        match g.selected {
1191	            None => {
1192	                // Try to select a piece. Allowed if there's a legal move from this square.
1193	                let any = view.legal_moves.iter().any(|m| m.origin_square() == sq);
1194	                if any {
1195	                    g.selected = Some(sq);
1196	                    g.last_msg = None;
1197	                } else {
1198	                    // Maybe it's a banqi hidden cell — suggest 'f' to flip.
1199	                    match g.state.board.get(sq) {
1200	                        Some(p) if !p.revealed => {
1201	                            g.last_msg = Some("Hidden piece. Press 'f' to flip.".into());
1202	                        }
1203	                        _ => g.last_msg = Some("No legal move from that square.".into()),
1204	                    }
1205	                }
1206	            }
1207	            Some(from) if from == sq => {
1208	                g.selected = None;
1209	                g.last_msg = None;
1210	            }
1211	            Some(from) => {
1212	                let candidate = view
1213	                    .legal_moves
1214	                    .iter()
1215	                    .find(|m| m.origin_square() == from && m.to_square() == Some(sq))
1216	                    .cloned();
1217	                match candidate {
1218	                    Some(m) => Self::apply_move(g, m),
1219	                    None => {
1220	                        g.last_msg = Some("Illegal move.".into());
1221	                        g.selected = None;
1222	                    }
1223	                }
1224	            }
1225	        }
1226	    }
1227	
1228	    fn apply_move(g: &mut GameView, m: Move) {
1229	        match g.state.make_move(&m) {
1230	            Ok(()) => {
1231	                g.state.refresh_status();
1232	                g.selected = None;
1233	                g.last_msg = Some(format!(
1234	                    "Played: {}",
1235	                    chess_core::notation::iccs::encode_move(&g.state.board, &m)
1236	                ));
1237	            }
1238	            Err(e) => {
1239	                g.last_msg = Some(format!("Engine rejected move: {e}"));
1240	                g.selected = None;
1241	            }
1242	        }
1243	    }
1244	
1245	    fn dispatch_net(&mut self, action: Action) {
1246	        let Screen::Net(n) = &mut self.screen else {
1247	            return;
1248	        };
1249	        // Pre-welcome: no view yet, nothing to dispatch on.
1250	        let Some(view) = n.last_view.as_ref() else {
1251	            return;
1252	        };
1253	        let shape = view.shape;
1254	        let (rows, cols) = orient::display_dims(shape);
1255	        let role = n.role.unwrap_or(NetRole::Player(Side::RED));
1256	        let observer = role.observer();
1257	        match action {
1258	            Action::CursorUp if n.cursor.0 > 0 => {
1259	                n.cursor.0 -= 1;
1260	            }
1261	            Action::CursorDown if n.cursor.0 + 1 < rows => {
1262	                n.cursor.0 += 1;
1263	            }
1264	            Action::CursorLeft if n.cursor.1 > 0 => {
1265	                n.cursor.1 -= 1;
1266	            }
1267	            Action::CursorRight if n.cursor.1 + 1 < cols => {
1268	                n.cursor.1 += 1;
1269	            }
1270	            Action::Cancel => {
1271	                if let Some(at) = view.chain_lock {
1272	                    // Engine 連吃 mode: Esc → Move::EndChain.
1273	                    if !role.is_spectator() {
1274	                        let _ = n.client.cmd_tx.send(ClientMsg::Move { mv: Move::EndChain { at } });
1275	                    }
1276	                } else {
1277	                    n.selected = None;
1278	                    n.last_msg = None;
1279	                }
1280	            }
1281	            Action::SelectOrCommit => {
1282	                if role.is_spectator() {
1283	                    n.last_msg = Some("Spectators cannot move.".into());
1284	                    return;
1285	                }
1286	                let outcome = compute_select_outcome(n, observer);
1287	                apply_select_outcome(n, outcome);
1288	            }
1289	            Action::Flip => {
1290	                if role.is_spectator() {
1291	                    n.last_msg = Some("Spectators cannot move.".into());
1292	                    return;
1293	                }
1294	                if !matches!(view.status, GameStatus::Ongoing) {
1295	                    n.last_msg = Some("Game over.".into());
1296	                    return;
1297	                }
1298	                if view.side_to_move != observer {
1299	                    n.last_msg = Some("Not your turn.".into());
1300	                    return;
1301	                }
1302	                let Some(sq) = orient::square_at_display(n.cursor.0, n.cursor.1, observer, shape)
1303	                else {
1304	                    n.last_msg = Some("Cursor not on a playable square.".into());
1305	                    return;
1306	                };
1307	                let _ = n
1308	                    .client
1309	                    .cmd_tx
1310	                    .send(ClientMsg::Move { mv: Move::Reveal { at: sq, revealed: None } });
1311	                n.last_msg = Some("Reveal sent.".into());
1312	            }
1313	            Action::Undo => {
1314	                n.last_msg = Some("Undo not supported in online mode yet.".into());
1315	            }
1316	            Action::Click { term_col, term_row } => {
1317	                if role.is_spectator() {
1318	                    return;
1319	                }
1320	                if let Some(rect) = self.board_rect {
1321	                    if let Some((row, col)) = hit_test(rect, term_col, term_row, rows, cols) {
1322	                        let n = match &mut self.screen {
1323	                            Screen::Net(b) => b,
1324	                            _ => return,
1325	                        };
1326	                        n.cursor = (row, col);
1327	                        let outcome = compute_select_outcome(n, observer);
1328	                        apply_select_outcome(n, outcome);
1329	                    }
1330	                }
1331	            }
1332	            _ => {}
1333	        }
1334	    }
1335	}
1336	
1337	enum SelectOutcome {
1338	    Ignore,
1339	    Msg(String),
1340	    ClearAndMsg(String),
1341	    Select(Square),
1342	    Deselect,
1343	    Commit(Move),
1344	}
1345	
1346	fn compute_select_outcome(n: &NetView, observer: Side) -> SelectOutcome {
1347	    let Some(view) = n.last_view.as_ref() else {
1348	        return SelectOutcome::Ignore;
1349	    };
1350	    if !matches!(view.status, GameStatus::Ongoing) {
1351	        return SelectOutcome::Msg("Game over.".into());
1352	    }
1353	    let shape = view.shape;
1354	    let Some(sq) = orient::square_at_display(n.cursor.0, n.cursor.1, observer, shape) else {
1355	        return SelectOutcome::Msg("Cursor not on a playable square.".into());
1356	    };
1357	    if view.side_to_move != observer {
1358	        return SelectOutcome::Msg("Not your turn.".into());
1359	    }
1360	
1361	    // Engine 連吃 chain mode: only the locked piece may move (captures
1362	    // only). Clicking the locked piece itself ends the chain.
1363	    if let Some(locked) = view.chain_lock {
1364	        if sq == locked {
1365	            return SelectOutcome::Commit(Move::EndChain { at: locked });
1366	        }
1367	        let candidate = view
1368	            .legal_moves
1369	            .iter()
1370	            .find(|m| m.origin_square() == locked && m.to_square() == Some(sq))
1371	            .cloned();
1372	        return match candidate {
1373	            Some(mv) => SelectOutcome::Commit(mv),
1374	            None => SelectOutcome::Msg(
1375	                "連吃 active — capture from the locked piece, or Esc / Enter on it to end.".into(),
1376	            ),
1377	        };
1378	    }
1379	
1380	    match n.selected {
1381	        None => {
1382	            if view.legal_moves.iter().any(|m| m.origin_square() == sq) {
1383	                SelectOutcome::Select(sq)
1384	            } else if matches!(view.cells[sq.0 as usize], VisibleCell::Hidden) {
1385	                SelectOutcome::Msg("Hidden piece. Press 'f' to flip.".into())
1386	            } else {
1387	                SelectOutcome::Msg("No legal move from that square.".into())
1388	            }
1389	        }
1390	        Some(from) if from == sq => SelectOutcome::Deselect,
1391	        Some(from) => {
1392	            let candidate = view
1393	                .legal_moves
1394	                .iter()
1395	                .find(|m| m.origin_square() == from && m.to_square() == Some(sq))
1396	                .cloned();
1397	            match candidate {
1398	                Some(mv) => SelectOutcome::Commit(mv),
1399	                None => SelectOutcome::ClearAndMsg("Illegal move.".into()),
1400	            }
1401	        }
1402	    }
1403	}
1404	
1405	fn coord_help_msg(kind: CoordKind) -> String {
1406	    match kind {
1407	        CoordKind::Instant => {
1408	            "Coord (instant): type ICCS (e.g. h2e2 / flip a0), Enter commits, Esc cancels.".into()
1409	        }
1410	        CoordKind::Live => {
1411	            "Coord (live): type ICCS — selected/cursor preview as you go, Esc restores.".into()
1412	        }
1413	    }
1414	}
1415	
1416	/// Net-side coord-input dispatcher. Mirrors `dispatch_coord_text_game` but
1417	/// gates on connection / role / turn / game-status before sending the move.
1418	fn dispatch_coord_text_net(n: &mut NetView, action: Action) {
1419	    let Some(ci) = n.coord_input.as_mut() else {
1420	        return;
1421	    };
1422	    let kind = ci.kind;
1423	    match action {
1424	        Action::TextInput(c) => {
1425	            text_input::push_char(&mut ci.buf, c, COORD_INPUT_MAX);
1426	            if matches!(kind, CoordKind::Live) {
1427	                live_preview_net(n);
1428	            }
1429	        }
1430	        Action::TextBackspace => {
1431	            text_input::backspace(&mut ci.buf);
1432	            if matches!(kind, CoordKind::Live) {
1433	                live_preview_net(n);
1434	            }
1435	        }
1436	        Action::Submit => {
1437	            let Some(view) = n.last_view.as_ref() else {
1438	                n.last_msg = Some("Not connected yet.".into());
1439	                return;
1440	            };
1441	            let role = n.role.unwrap_or(NetRole::Player(Side::RED));
1442	            if role.is_spectator() {
1443	                n.last_msg = Some("Spectators cannot move.".into());
1444	                n.coord_input = None;
1445	                return;
1446	            }
1447	            if !matches!(view.status, GameStatus::Ongoing) {
1448	                n.last_msg = Some("Game over.".into());
1449	                n.coord_input = None;
1450	                return;
1451	            }
1452	            if view.side_to_move != role.observer() {
1453	                n.last_msg = Some("Not your turn.".into());
1454	                return; // keep buffer so the user can resubmit when their turn comes
1455	            }
1456	            let buf = match n.coord_input.as_mut() {
1457	                Some(ci) => std::mem::take(&mut ci.buf),
1458	                None => return,
1459	            };
1460	            match chess_core::notation::iccs::decode_move_from_view(view, buf.trim()) {
1461	                Ok(mv) => {
1462	                    n.coord_input = None;
1463	                    n.selected = None;
1464	                    let _ = n.client.cmd_tx.send(ClientMsg::Move { mv });
1465	                    n.last_msg = Some("Sent.".into());
1466	                }
1467	                Err(e) => {
1468	                    if let Some(ci) = n.coord_input.as_mut() {
1469	                        ci.buf = buf;
1470	                    }
1471	                    n.last_msg = Some(format!("Bad move: {e}"));
1472	                }
1473	            }
1474	        }
1475	        _ => {}
1476	    }
1477	}
1478	
1479	/// Result of one live-preview re-parse: the selected-square highlight to
1480	/// show, and an optional cursor jump (only set when a destination square is
1481	/// fully typed). Used by both Game and Net live-preview hooks.
1482	struct LivePreview {
1483	    selected: Option<Square>,
1484	    cursor_jump: Option<(u8, u8)>,
1485	}
1486	
1487	fn live_preview_game(g: &mut GameView, observer: Side) {
1488	    let buf = match g.coord_input.as_ref() {
1489	        Some(ci) => ci.buf.clone(),
1490	        None => return,
1491	    };
1492	    let shape = g.state.board.shape();
1493	    let lp = apply_live_preview(
1494	        &buf,
1495	        |s| chess_core::notation::iccs::parse_square_str(&g.state.board, s),
1496	        shape,
1497	        observer,
1498	    );
1499	    g.selected = lp.selected;
1500	    if let Some(c) = lp.cursor_jump {
1501	        g.cursor = c;
1502	    }
1503	}
1504	
1505	fn live_preview_net(n: &mut NetView) {
1506	    let buf = match n.coord_input.as_ref() {
1507	        Some(ci) => ci.buf.clone(),
1508	        None => return,
1509	    };
1510	    let Some(view) = n.last_view.as_ref() else {
1511	        return;
1512	    };
1513	    let shape = view.shape;
1514	    let observer = n.role.map(|r| r.observer()).unwrap_or(Side::RED);
1515	    let board = chess_core::board::Board::new(shape);
1516	    let lp = apply_live_preview(
1517	        &buf,
1518	        |s| chess_core::notation::iccs::parse_square_str(&board, s),
1519	        shape,
1520	        observer,
1521	    );
1522	    n.selected = lp.selected;
1523	    if let Some(c) = lp.cursor_jump {
1524	        n.cursor = c;
1525	    }
1526	}
1527	
1528	/// Re-parses `buf` and computes the highlight + cursor-jump for the
1529	/// live-preview coord prompt. Intentionally tolerant: parse failures simply
1530	/// don't advance the highlight, so the user can backspace and retry without
1531	/// an error popup.
1532	///
1533	/// - `""` or 1-char prefix → `selected = None`, no jump.
1534	/// - 2 chars valid square → `selected = Some(origin)`, no jump.
1535	/// - 4 chars valid `from+to` (no separator) → also `cursor_jump = display(to)`.
1536	/// - `<from>x<to>` (single hop, e.g. `h2xh9`) → same destination jump.
1537	/// - `flip <sq>` form → highlight the named square as `selected`.
1538	fn apply_live_preview<F>(
1539	    buf: &str,
1540	    mut parse_sq: F,
1541	    shape: BoardShape,
1542	    observer: Side,
1543	) -> LivePreview
1544	where
1545	    F: FnMut(&str) -> Option<Square>,
1546	{
1547	    let none = LivePreview { selected: None, cursor_jump: None };
1548	    if buf.is_empty() {
1549	        return none;
1550	    }
1551	    if let Some(rest) = buf.strip_prefix("flip ") {
1552	        if rest.len() >= 2 {
1553	            if let Some(sq) = parse_sq(&rest[..2]) {
1554	                return LivePreview { selected: Some(sq), cursor_jump: None };
1555	            }
1556	        }
1557	        return none;
1558	    }
1559	    if buf.len() < 2 {
1560	        return none;
1561	    }
1562	    let Some(origin) = parse_sq(&buf[..2]) else {
1563	        return none;
1564	    };
1565	    let dest_str: Option<&str> = if buf.len() == 4 && !buf.contains('x') {
1566	        Some(&buf[2..4])
1567	    } else if buf.contains('x') {
1568	        let parts: Vec<&str> = buf.split('x').collect();
1569	        parts.iter().rev().find_map(|p| if p.len() == 2 { Some(*p) } else { None })
1570	    } else {
1571	        None
1572	    };
1573	    let cursor_jump =
1574	        dest_str.and_then(parse_sq).map(|dest| orient::project_cell(dest, observer, shape));
1575	    LivePreview { selected: Some(origin), cursor_jump }
1576	}
1577	
1578	fn apply_select_outcome(n: &mut NetView, outcome: SelectOutcome) {
1579	    match outcome {
1580	        SelectOutcome::Ignore => {}
1581	        SelectOutcome::Msg(m) => n.last_msg = Some(m),
1582	        SelectOutcome::ClearAndMsg(m) => {
1583	            n.selected = None;
1584	            n.last_msg = Some(m);
1585	        }
1586	        SelectOutcome::Select(sq) => {
1587	            n.selected = Some(sq);
1588	            n.last_msg = None;
1589	        }
1590	        SelectOutcome::Deselect => {
1591	            n.selected = None;
1592	            n.last_msg = None;
1593	        }
1594	        SelectOutcome::Commit(mv) => {
1595	            let _ = n.client.cmd_tx.send(ClientMsg::Move { mv });
1596	            n.selected = None;
1597	            n.last_msg = Some("Sent.".into());
1598	        }
1599	    }
1600	}
1601	
1602	fn apply_net_event(n: &mut NetView, evt: NetEvent) {
1603	    match evt {
1604	        NetEvent::Connected => {
1605	            n.connected = true;
1606	            n.last_msg = Some("Connected. Waiting for welcome…".into());
1607	        }
1608	        NetEvent::Server(boxed) => match *boxed {
1609	            ServerMsg::Hello { observer, rules, view, .. } => {
1610	                let was_seated = n.role.is_some();
1611	                n.role = Some(NetRole::Player(observer));
1612	                n.rules = Some(rules);
1613	                let shape = view.shape;
1614	                let (rows, cols) = orient::display_dims(shape);
1615	                n.cursor = (rows / 2, cols / 2);
1616	                n.selected = None;
1617	                n.last_view = Some(view);
1618	                n.connected = true;
1619	                // First Hello = "Joined as X". Subsequent Hello = rematch reset.
1620	                n.last_msg = Some(if was_seated {
1621	                    "Rematch — new game.".into()
1622	                } else {
1623	                    format!("Joined as {}.", side_label(observer))
1624	                });
1625	            }
1626	            ServerMsg::Spectating { rules, view, .. } => {
1627	                let was_welcomed = n.role.is_some();
1628	                n.role = Some(NetRole::Spectator);
1629	                n.rules = Some(rules);
1630	                let shape = view.shape;
1631	                let (rows, cols) = orient::display_dims(shape);
1632	                n.cursor = (rows / 2, cols / 2);
1633	                n.selected = None;
1634	                n.last_view = Some(view);
1635	                n.connected = true;
1636	                n.last_msg = Some(if was_welcomed {
1637	                    "Rematch — new game (spectating).".into()
1638	                } else {
1639	                    "Joined as spectator (read-only).".into()
1640	                });
1641	            }
1642	            ServerMsg::Update { view } => {
1643	                n.last_view = Some(view);
1644	                if n.last_msg.as_deref() == Some("Sent.") {
1645	                    n.last_msg = None;
1646	                }
1647	            }
1648	            ServerMsg::ChatHistory { lines } => {
1649	                n.chat.clear();
1650	                for line in lines.into_iter().take(CHAT_HISTORY_CAP) {
1651	                    n.chat.push_back(line);
1652	                }
1653	            }
1654	            ServerMsg::Chat { line } => {
1655	                n.chat.push_back(line);
1656	                while n.chat.len() > CHAT_HISTORY_CAP {
1657	                    n.chat.pop_front();
1658	                }
1659	            }
1660	            ServerMsg::Error { message } => {
1661	                n.last_msg = Some(message);
1662	            }
1663	            ServerMsg::Rooms { .. } => {
1664	                n.last_msg = Some("(unexpected lobby payload on game socket)".into());
1665	            }
1666	        },
1667	        NetEvent::Disconnected(reason) => {
1668	            n.connected = false;
1669	            n.last_msg = Some(format!("Disconnected: {reason}"));
1670	        }
1671	    }
1672	}
1673	
1674	fn side_label(side: Side) -> &'static str {
1675	    if side == Side::RED {
1676	        "Red 紅"
1677	    } else if side == Side::BLACK {
1678	        "Black 黑"
1679	    } else {
1680	        "Green 綠"
1681	    }
1682	}
1683	
1684	fn apply_lobby_event(l: &mut LobbyView, evt: NetEvent) {
1685	    match evt {
1686	        NetEvent::Connected => {
1687	            l.connected = true;
1688	            l.last_msg = Some("Lobby connected.".into());
1689	        }
1690	        NetEvent::Server(boxed) => match *boxed {
1691	            ServerMsg::Rooms { rooms } => {
1692	                let prev_id = l.rooms.get(l.cursor).map(|r| r.id.clone());
1693	                l.rooms = rooms;
1694	                l.rooms.sort_by(|a, b| a.id.cmp(&b.id));
1695	                // Try to keep the cursor on the same room id; otherwise clamp.
1696	                if let Some(id) = prev_id {
1697	                    if let Some(idx) = l.rooms.iter().position(|r| r.id == id) {
1698	                        l.cursor = idx;
1699	                    } else if l.cursor >= l.rooms.len() && !l.rooms.is_empty() {
1700	                        l.cursor = l.rooms.len() - 1;
1701	                    } else if l.rooms.is_empty() {
1702	                        l.cursor = 0;
1703	                    }
1704	                } else if l.cursor >= l.rooms.len() && !l.rooms.is_empty() {
1705	                    l.cursor = l.rooms.len() - 1;
1706	                }
1707	            }
1708	            ServerMsg::Error { message } => {
1709	                l.last_msg = Some(message);
1710	            }
1711	            ServerMsg::Hello { .. }
1712	            | ServerMsg::Update { .. }
1713	            | ServerMsg::Spectating { .. }
1714	            | ServerMsg::ChatHistory { .. }
1715	            | ServerMsg::Chat { .. } => {
1716	                // Game-socket payloads should never arrive on a lobby ws.
1717	                // If they do (server bug), surface for debugging.
1718	                l.last_msg = Some("(unexpected game payload on lobby socket)".into());
1719	            }
1720	        },
1721	        NetEvent::Disconnected(reason) => {
1722	            l.connected = false;
1723	            l.last_msg = Some(format!("Lobby disconnected: {reason}"));
1724	        }
1725	    }
1726	}
1727	
1728	/// Convert terminal click coords to (display_row, display_col) within board.
1729	///
1730	/// Cells are `cell_rows × cell_cols` terminal cells. With the intersection
1731	/// layout, `cell_rows = 2` (rank row + between row) so clicks on either of
1732	/// those rows resolve to the same display cell — including the river row,
1733	/// which simply replaces the between-row at index 4 without changing the
1734	/// row layout.
1735	fn hit_test(rect: RectPx, term_col: u16, term_row: u16, rows: u8, cols: u8) -> Option<(u8, u8)> {
1736	    if term_col < rect.x + rect.left_pad || term_row < rect.y + rect.top_pad {
1737	        return None;
1738	    }
1739	    let col_off = term_col - rect.x - rect.left_pad;
1740	    let row_off = term_row - rect.y - rect.top_pad;
1741	    if rect.cell_cols == 0 || rect.cell_rows == 0 {
1742	        return None;
1743	    }
1744	    let cell_col = col_off / rect.cell_cols;
1745	    let cell_row = row_off / rect.cell_rows;
1746	    if cell_row >= rows as u16 || cell_col >= cols as u16 {
1747	        return None;
1748	    }
1749	    Some((cell_row as u8, cell_col as u8))
1750	}
1751
```

```text
1	//! Keyboard / mouse events → `Action`. Pure mapping; no state mutation.
2	
3	use crossterm::event::{KeyCode, KeyEvent, KeyModifiers, MouseButton, MouseEvent, MouseEventKind};
4	
5	/// Where the user's focus is right now. Drives the keymap branch in
6	/// [`from_key`]. `Game` covers both local hot-seat (`Screen::Game`) and
7	/// online (`Screen::Net`) play.
8	#[derive(Copy, Clone, Eq, PartialEq, Debug)]
9	pub enum InputMode {
10	    Picker,
11	    Lobby,
12	    Text,
13	    Game,
14	}
15	
16	/// Flavor of the coordinate-input prompt opened from `Game` mode.
17	/// `Instant` = pure text buffer, no board feedback.
18	/// `Live` = each keystroke re-parses; valid square prefixes update the
19	/// `selected` highlight, and a complete `from+to` move also moves the
20	/// cursor onto the destination square as a preview.
21	#[derive(Copy, Clone, Eq, PartialEq, Debug)]
22	pub enum CoordKind {
23	    Instant,
24	    Live,
25	}
26	
27	#[derive(Clone, Debug)]
28	pub enum Action {
29	    None,
30	    Quit,
31	    /// Confirm an open quit-confirm dialog (user pressed y/Y).
32	    ConfirmYes,
33	    /// Cancel an open quit-confirm dialog (user pressed anything else).
34	    ConfirmNo,
35	    HelpToggle,
36	    RulesToggle,
37	    NewGame,
38	    /// "Back one screen" — Esc semantics outside game/picker. The
39	    /// dispatcher decides what to back into per screen.
40	    Back,
41	    /// Toggle the captured-pieces panel sort order (Time ↔ Rank).
42	    /// Bound to `g` ("graveyard") in `Game` mode; Picker / Lobby ignore.
43	    CapturedSortToggle,
44	    // Picker / Lobby (list-cursor)
45	    PickerUp,
46	    PickerDown,
47	    PickerSelect,
48	    // Lobby
49	    LobbyCreate,
50	    LobbyRefresh,
51	    /// Spectate the highlighted room (`?role=spectator`).
52	    LobbyWatch,
53	    // Text input (HostPrompt / CreateRoom)
54	    TextInput(char),
55	    TextBackspace,
56	    FocusNext,
57	    FocusPrev,
58	    /// Submit a text-input form (Enter while in `Text` mode).
59	    Submit,
60	    // Game
61	    CursorUp,
62	    CursorDown,
63	    CursorLeft,
64	    CursorRight,
65	    SelectOrCommit,
66	    Cancel,
67	    Undo,
68	    Flip,
69	    /// Open the chat input editor (Net mode, players only).
70	    ChatStart,
71	    /// Open the coordinate-input prompt (Game / Net, players only). The
72	    /// kind picks instant-vs-live preview behaviour.
73	    CoordStart(CoordKind),
74	    /// Mouse click in terminal coords. The app resolves it against the board
75	    /// rect captured by the most recent draw().
76	    Click {
77	        term_col: u16,
78	        term_row: u16,
79	    },
80	}
81	
82	pub fn from_key(ev: KeyEvent, mode: InputMode, quit_confirm_open: bool) -> Action {
83	    // Quit-confirm dialog hijacks input: y/Y confirms, anything else cancels.
84	    if quit_confirm_open {
85	        return match ev.code {
86	            KeyCode::Char('y') | KeyCode::Char('Y') => Action::ConfirmYes,
87	            _ => Action::ConfirmNo,
88	        };
89	    }
90	    if ev.modifiers.contains(KeyModifiers::CONTROL) && matches!(ev.code, KeyCode::Char('c')) {
91	        return Action::Quit;
92	    }
93	    match mode {
94	        InputMode::Picker => match ev.code {
95	            KeyCode::Up | KeyCode::Char('k') => Action::PickerUp,
96	            KeyCode::Down | KeyCode::Char('j') => Action::PickerDown,
97	            KeyCode::Enter | KeyCode::Char(' ') => Action::PickerSelect,
98	            KeyCode::Char('q') => Action::Quit,
99	            KeyCode::Char('?') => Action::HelpToggle,
100	            KeyCode::Esc => Action::Quit,
101	            _ => Action::None,
102	        },
103	        InputMode::Lobby => match ev.code {
104	            KeyCode::Up | KeyCode::Char('k') => Action::PickerUp,
105	            KeyCode::Down | KeyCode::Char('j') => Action::PickerDown,
106	            KeyCode::Enter | KeyCode::Char(' ') => Action::PickerSelect,
107	            KeyCode::Char('c') => Action::LobbyCreate,
108	            KeyCode::Char('r') => Action::LobbyRefresh,
109	            KeyCode::Char('w') => Action::LobbyWatch,
110	            KeyCode::Char('q') => Action::Quit,
111	            KeyCode::Char('?') => Action::HelpToggle,
112	            KeyCode::Esc => Action::Back,
113	            _ => Action::None,
114	        },
115	        InputMode::Text => match ev.code {
116	            KeyCode::Esc => Action::Back,
117	            KeyCode::Enter => Action::Submit,
118	            KeyCode::Backspace => Action::TextBackspace,
119	            KeyCode::Tab => Action::FocusNext,
120	            KeyCode::BackTab => Action::FocusPrev,
121	            KeyCode::Char(c) => Action::TextInput(c),
122	            _ => Action::None,
123	        },
124	        InputMode::Game => match ev.code {
125	            KeyCode::Char('q') => Action::Quit,
126	            KeyCode::Char('?') => Action::HelpToggle,
127	            KeyCode::Char('r') => Action::RulesToggle,
128	            KeyCode::Up | KeyCode::Char('k') => Action::CursorUp,
129	            KeyCode::Down | KeyCode::Char('j') => Action::CursorDown,
130	            KeyCode::Left | KeyCode::Char('h') => Action::CursorLeft,
131	            KeyCode::Right | KeyCode::Char('l') => Action::CursorRight,
132	            KeyCode::Enter | KeyCode::Char(' ') => Action::SelectOrCommit,
133	            KeyCode::Esc => Action::Cancel,
134	            KeyCode::Char('u') => Action::Undo,
135	            KeyCode::Char('f') => Action::Flip,
136	            KeyCode::Char('n') => Action::NewGame,
137	            KeyCode::Char('g') => Action::CapturedSortToggle,
138	            KeyCode::Char('t') => Action::ChatStart,
139	            KeyCode::Char(':') => Action::CoordStart(CoordKind::Instant),
140	            KeyCode::Char('m') => Action::CoordStart(CoordKind::Live),
141	            _ => Action::None,
142	        },
143	    }
144	}
145	
146	pub fn from_mouse(ev: MouseEvent) -> Action {
147	    match ev.kind {
148	        MouseEventKind::Down(MouseButton::Left) => {
149	            Action::Click { term_col: ev.column, term_row: ev.row }
150	        }
151	        _ => Action::None,
152	    }
153	}
154
```

```text
1	//! ratatui draw layer. Stateless — reads `AppState` and draws.
2	
3	use chess_core::board::BoardShape;
4	use chess_core::coord::Square;
5	use chess_core::piece::{PieceKind, Side};
6	use chess_core::state::{GameStatus, WinReason};

9	use ratatui::layout::{Constraint, Direction, Layout, Rect};
10	use ratatui::style::{Color, Modifier, Style as TuiStyle};
11	use ratatui::text::{Line, Span};
12	use ratatui::widgets::{Block, Borders, Clear, Paragraph, Wrap};
13	use ratatui::Frame;
14	
15	use crate::app::{
16	    self, AppState, CapturedSort, CreateRoomField, CreateRoomView, GameView, HostPromptView,
17	    LobbyView, NetRole, NetView, PickerEntry, PickerView, RectPx, Screen,
18	};
19	use crate::banner::{self, BannerKind, NeutralSide};
20	use crate::confetti::ConfettiAnim;

25	const CELL_COLS: u16 = 4;
26	const CELL_ROWS: u16 = 2;
27	const RANK_LABEL_COLS: u16 = 3;
28	
29	pub fn draw(frame: &mut Frame, app: &mut AppState) {
30	    let area = frame.area();
31	    let app_style = app.style;
32	    match &app.screen {
33	        Screen::Picker(p) => draw_picker(frame, area, p, app_style),
34	        Screen::Game(_) => draw_game(frame, area, app),
35	        Screen::Net(_) => draw_net(frame, area, app),
36	        Screen::HostPrompt(h) => draw_host_prompt(frame, area, h, app.help_open),
37	        Screen::Lobby(l) => draw_lobby(frame, area, l, app.help_open),
38	        Screen::CreateRoom(c) => draw_create_room(frame, area, c),
39	    }
40	
41	    if app.rules_open {
42	        draw_rules_overlay(frame, area, app.style);
43	    }
44	    if app.quit_confirm_open {
45	        draw_quit_confirm_overlay(frame, area);
46	    }
47	}
48	
49	fn draw_picker(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, picker: &PickerView, style: Style) {
50	    let mut lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::new();
51	
52	    // Big "CHESS TUI" ASCII banner — only when the terminal is wide enough.
53	    // Narrow terminals (less than the banner width + a little padding) fall
54	    // back to the original single-line title so the picker still fits.
55	    let title_art = banner::art(BannerKind::AppTitle, style);
56	    let banner_w = banner::max_width(title_art);
57	    if (area.width as usize) >= banner_w + 4 {
58	        for row in title_art {
59	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
60	                row.to_string(),
61	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
62	            )));
63	        }
64	    } else {
65	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
66	            "chess-tui",
67	            TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
68	        )));
69	    }
70	    lines.push(Line::from(""));
71	    lines.push(Line::from(Span::raw("Choose a variant. Arrow keys + Enter; q to quit.")));
72	    lines.push(Line::from(""));
73	    for (i, entry) in PickerEntry::ALL.iter().enumerate() {
74	        let prefix = if i == picker.cursor { "▶ " } else { "  " };
75	        let row_style = if i == picker.cursor {
76	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)
77	        } else {
78	            TuiStyle::default()
79	        };
80	        lines.push(Line::from(vec![Span::raw(prefix), Span::styled(entry.label(), row_style)]));
81	    }
82	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Welcome ");
83	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
84	    frame.render_widget(para, area);
85	}
86	
87	fn draw_game(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, app: &mut AppState) {
88	    let chunks = Layout::default()
89	        .direction(Direction::Horizontal)
90	        .constraints([Constraint::Min(40), Constraint::Length(36)])
91	        .split(area);
92	
93	    let Screen::Game(g) = &app.screen else {
94	        return;
95	    };
96	    let g_ref: &GameView = g.as_ref();
97	    let observer = app.observer;
98	    let style = app.style;
99	    let use_color = app.use_color;
100	    let help_open = app.help_open;
101	    let show_check_banner = app.show_check_banner;
102	
103	    let view = PlayerView::project(&g_ref.state, g_ref.state.side_to_move);
104	    // Engine 連吃 chain_lock takes precedence as the "effective selection"
105	    // so the locked piece + its legal next-hops light up automatically —
106	    // the user doesn't have to re-click their attacker between hops.
107	    let effective_selected = view.chain_lock.or(g_ref.selected);
108	    let mut rect = app.board_rect;
109	    draw_board(
110	        frame,
111	        chunks[0],
112	        observer,
113	        style,
114	        use_color,
115	        &view,
116	        g_ref.cursor,
117	        effective_selected,
118	        &mut rect,
119	    );
120	    app.board_rect = rect;
121	    let captured_sort = app.captured_sort;
122	    draw_sidebar(
123	        frame,
124	        chunks[1],
125	        g_ref,
126	        &view,
127	        style,
128	        help_open,
129	        show_check_banner,
130	        captured_sort,
131	    );
132	
133	    // Confetti + endgame banner. The board area is `chunks[0]`. We do this
134	    // after the sidebar render so the layer paints on top of the board only,
135	    // and after we've taken the `&app.screen` immutable borrow above.
136	    let board_area = chunks[0];
137	    let endgame_kind = endgame_kind_local(&view.status, observer);
138	    render_confetti_and_banner(frame, board_area, app, endgame_kind, style, use_color);
139	}
140	
141	fn draw_net(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, app: &mut AppState) {
142	    let chunks = Layout::default()
143	        .direction(Direction::Horizontal)
144	        .constraints([Constraint::Min(40), Constraint::Length(36)])
145	        .split(area);
146	
147	    let Screen::Net(n) = &app.screen else {
148	        return;
149	    };
150	    let n_ref: &NetView = n.as_ref();
151	    let style = app.style;
152	    let use_color = app.use_color;
153	    let help_open = app.help_open;
154	    let show_check_banner = app.show_check_banner;
155	    let observer = n_ref.role.map(|r| r.observer()).unwrap_or(app.observer);
156	
157	    match n_ref.last_view.as_ref() {
158	        Some(view) => {
159	            let view_status = view.status;
160	            let role = n_ref.role;
161	            // Engine 連吃 chain_lock takes precedence as the "effective
162	            // selection" — chain-locked piece + next-hops auto-highlighted.
163	            let effective_selected = view.chain_lock.or(n_ref.selected);
164	            let mut rect = app.board_rect;
165	            draw_board(
166	                frame,
167	                chunks[0],
168	                observer,
169	                style,
170	                use_color,
171	                view,
172	                n_ref.cursor,
173	                effective_selected,
174	                &mut rect,
175	            );
176	            app.board_rect = rect;
177	            let captured_sort = app.captured_sort;
178	            draw_sidebar_net(
179	                frame,
180	                chunks[1],
181	                n_ref,
182	                view,
183	                style,
184	                help_open,
185	                show_check_banner,
186	                captured_sort,
187	            );
188	
189	            let board_area = chunks[0];
190	            let endgame_kind = endgame_kind_net(&view_status, role);
191	            render_confetti_and_banner(frame, board_area, app, endgame_kind, style, use_color);
192	        }
193	        None => {
194	            draw_connecting_placeholder(frame, chunks[0], n_ref);
195	            draw_sidebar_net_idle(frame, chunks[1], n_ref);
196	        }
197	    }
198	}

200	fn draw_connecting_placeholder(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, n: &NetView) {

205	        Line::from(Span::styled(format!("  → {}", n.url), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Gray))),
206	        Line::from(""),
207	        Line::from(Span::styled(
208	            n.last_msg.clone().unwrap_or_else(|| "  (waiting for server hello)".into()),
209	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow),
210	        )),
211	    ];
212	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
213	    frame.render_widget(para, area);
214	}

229	    let title =
230	        Span::styled("Connect to chess-net", TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD));
231	    let mut lines = vec![

244	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
245	    }

252	            "Enter to connect, Esc to go back, ? for help.",

254	        )));

256	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Online ");

261	fn draw_lobby(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, l: &LobbyView, help_open: bool) {
262	    // Two columns: room list (left) + status/help (right). When the user is
263	    // mid-password-prompt, overlay a small modal.
264	    let chunks = Layout::default()
265	        .direction(Direction::Horizontal)
266	        .constraints([Constraint::Min(40), Constraint::Length(36)])
267	        .split(area);
268	
269	    let header_style = TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray);
270	    let mut lines: Vec<Line<'static>> = Vec::with_capacity(l.rooms.len() + 4);
271	    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
272	        format!("Lobby — {}", l.host),
273	        TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
274	    )));
275	    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
276	        format!("{:<20} {:<14} {:<6} {:<6} {:<8}", "Room", "Variant", "Seats", "Watch", "Status"),
277	        header_style,
278	    )));
279	    if l.rooms.is_empty() {
280	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
281	            "  (no rooms yet — press 'c' to create one)",
282	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
283	        )));
284	    } else {
285	        for (i, r) in l.rooms.iter().enumerate() {
286	            let prefix = if i == l.cursor { "▶ " } else { "  " };
287	            let lock = if r.has_password { "🔒" } else { "  " };
288	            let status = match r.status {
289	                chess_net::RoomStatus::Lobby => "lobby",
290	                chess_net::RoomStatus::Playing => "playing",
291	                chess_net::RoomStatus::Finished => "finished",
292	            };
293	            let cell_style = if i == l.cursor {
294	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)
295	            } else {
296	                TuiStyle::default()
297	            };
298	            let spec_label =
299	                if r.spectators == 0 { "—".to_string() } else { format!("{}👁", r.spectators) };
300	            lines.push(Line::from(vec![
301	                Span::raw(prefix),
302	                Span::raw(lock),
303	                Span::raw(" "),
304	                Span::styled(
305	                    format!(
306	                        "{:<18} {:<14} {}/2   {:<6} {:<8}",
307	                        r.id, r.variant, r.seats, spec_label, status
308	                    ),
309	                    cell_style,
310	                ),
311	            ]));
312	        }
313	    }
314	
315	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Lobby ");
316	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
317	    frame.render_widget(para, chunks[0]);
318	
319	    draw_lobby_sidebar(frame, chunks[1], l, help_open);
320	
321	    if let Some(pj) = l.pending_join.as_ref() {
322	        let modal = Rect {
323	            x: area.x + area.width / 4,
324	            y: area.y + area.height / 3,
325	            width: (area.width / 2).max(40),
326	            height: 7,
327	        };
328	        frame.render_widget(Clear, modal);
329	        let lines = vec![
330	            Line::from(Span::styled(
331	                format!("Join '{}' — locked", pj.room_id),
332	                TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
333	            )),
334	            Line::from(""),
335	            Line::from(vec![
336	                Span::raw("Password: "),
337	                Span::styled(
338	                    format!("{}_", text_input::mask(&pj.password_buf)),
339	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow),
340	                ),
341	            ]),
342	            Line::from(""),
343	            Line::from(Span::styled(
344	                "Enter to join, Esc to cancel.",
345	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
346	            )),
347	        ];
348	        let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Password ");
349	        frame.render_widget(Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false }), modal);
350	    }
351	}

353	fn draw_lobby_sidebar(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, l: &LobbyView, help_open: bool) {
354	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Status ");
355	    let mut lines = vec![Line::from(vec![
356	        Span::raw("Connection: "),
357	        Span::styled(
358	            if l.connected { "ws live" } else { "connecting…" },
359	            TuiStyle::default().fg(if l.connected { Color::Green } else { Color::Yellow }),
360	        ),
361	    ])];
362	    lines.push(Line::from(format!("Rooms: {}", l.rooms.len())));
363	    lines.push(Line::from(""));
364	    if let Some(msg) = l.last_msg.as_deref() {
365	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(msg.to_string(), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Cyan))));
366	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
367	    }
368	    if help_open {
369	        for ln in HELP_LINES_LOBBY {
370	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(*ln, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray))));
371	        }
372	    } else {
373	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
374	            "Enter=join, w=watch, c=create, r=refresh, Esc=back, ?=help, q=quit.",
375	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
376	        )));
377	    }
378	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
379	    frame.render_widget(para, area);
380	}

382	fn draw_create_room(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, c: &CreateRoomView) {
383	    let title = Span::styled("Create room", TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD));
384	    let id_active = matches!(c.focus, CreateRoomField::Id);
385	    let pw_active = matches!(c.focus, CreateRoomField::Password);
386	    let submit_active = matches!(c.focus, CreateRoomField::Submit);
387	    let mut lines = vec![
388	        Line::from(title),
389	        Line::from(format!("Server: {}", c.host)),
390	        Line::from(""),
391	        Line::from(Span::raw("Room id (1–32 chars, [a-zA-Z0-9_-]):")),
392	        Line::from(vec![
393	            Span::raw(if id_active { "▶ " } else { "  " }),
394	            Span::styled(
395	                if id_active { format!("{}_", c.id_buf) } else { c.id_buf.clone() },
396	                if id_active {
397	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)
398	                } else {
399	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Gray)
400	                },
401	            ),
402	        ]),
403	        Line::from(""),
404	        Line::from(Span::raw("Password (optional, leave blank for open room):")),
405	        Line::from(vec![
406	            Span::raw(if pw_active { "▶ " } else { "  " }),
407	            Span::styled(
408	                if pw_active {
409	                    format!("{}_", text_input::mask(&c.password_buf))
410	                } else {
411	                    text_input::mask(&c.password_buf)
412	                },
413	                if pw_active {
414	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)
415	                } else {
416	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Gray)
417	                },
418	            ),
419	        ]),
420	        Line::from(""),
421	        Line::from(vec![
422	            Span::raw(if submit_active { "▶ " } else { "  " }),
423	            Span::styled(
424	                "[ Create & join ]",
425	                if submit_active {
426	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)
427	                } else {
428	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Gray)
429	                },
430	            ),
431	        ]),
432	    ];
433	    if let Some(err) = c.error.as_deref() {
434	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
435	        lines
436	            .push(Line::from(Span::styled(format!("× {err}"), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Red))));
437	    }
438	    lines.push(Line::from(""));
439	    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
440	        "Tab/Shift-Tab: switch field. Enter on submit creates the room. Esc: back.",
441	        TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
442	    )));
443	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" New room ");
444	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
445	    frame.render_widget(para, area);
446	}

451	    "Enter      open the lobby for that host",

458	    "j k / ↓ ↑   move cursor",
459	    "Enter       join the highlighted room (prompts for password if locked)",
460	    "w           watch the highlighted room as a spectator (read-only)",
461	    "c           create a new room",
```
