```text
467	
468	#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
469	fn draw_board(
470	    frame: &mut Frame,
471	    area: Rect,
472	    observer: Side,
473	    style: Style,
474	    use_color: bool,
475	    view: &PlayerView,
476	    cursor: (u8, u8),
477	    selected: Option<Square>,
478	    board_rect: &mut Option<RectPx>,
479	) {
480	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Board ");
481	    let inner = block.inner(area);
482	    frame.render_widget(block, area);
483	
484	    let shape = view.shape;
485	    let (rows, cols) = orient::display_dims(shape);
486	    let model_w = shape.dimensions().0;
487	
488	    // Build legal-target highlight set when a piece is selected.
489	    let highlight: std::collections::HashSet<Square> = match selected {
490	        Some(from) => view
491	            .legal_moves
492	            .iter()
493	            .filter(|m| m.origin_square() == from)
494	            .filter_map(|m| m.to_square())
495	            .collect(),
496	        None => std::collections::HashSet::new(),
497	    };
498	
499	    let border_style = TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray);
500	    let mut lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::with_capacity(rows as usize * 2 + 2);
501	
502	    // File header (top)
503	    lines.push(file_header_line(observer, shape));
504	
505	    let river_after = if matches!(shape, BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10) { Some(4u8) } else { None };
506	
507	    for display_row in 0..rows {
508	        lines.push(rank_row(
509	            view,
510	            observer,
511	            shape,
512	            display_row,
513	            cols,
514	            model_w,
515	            &highlight,
516	            cursor,
517	            selected,
518	            style,
519	            use_color,
520	            border_style,
521	        ));
522	
523	        // Between row (skip after last rank)
524	        if display_row + 1 == rows {
525	            // no between row after the final rank
526	        } else if river_after == Some(display_row) {
527	            lines.push(river_line(cols, style));
528	        } else {
529	            lines.push(between_row(observer, shape, display_row, cols, style, border_style));
530	        }
531	    }
532	
533	    // File header (bottom)
534	    lines.push(file_header_line(observer, shape));
535	
536	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines);
537	    frame.render_widget(para, inner);
538	
539	    *board_rect = Some(RectPx {
540	        x: inner.x,
541	        y: inner.y,
542	        cell_cols: CELL_COLS,
543	        cell_rows: CELL_ROWS,
544	        // file header (1)
545	        top_pad: 1,
546	        // rank label (3)
547	        left_pad: RANK_LABEL_COLS,
548	    });
549	}
550	
551	#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
552	fn rank_row<'a>(
553	    view: &'a PlayerView,
554	    observer: Side,
555	    shape: BoardShape,
556	    display_row: u8,
557	    cols: u8,
558	    model_w: u8,
559	    highlight: &std::collections::HashSet<Square>,
560	    cursor: (u8, u8),
561	    selected: Option<Square>,
562	    style: Style,
563	    use_color: bool,
564	    border_style: TuiStyle,
565	) -> Line<'a> {
566	    let mut spans: Vec<Span> = Vec::with_capacity(cols as usize * 2 + 1);
567	    spans.push(Span::raw(rank_label(observer, shape, display_row)));
568	
569	    for display_col in 0..cols {
570	        let sq = orient::square_at_display(display_row, display_col, observer, shape);
571	        let (content, st, is_piece_or_glyph) = match sq {
572	            Some(sq) => intersection_or_piece(
573	                view,
574	                sq,
575	                model_w,
576	                shape,
577	                highlight,
578	                cursor,
579	                selected,
580	                style,
581	                use_color,
582	                display_row,
583	                display_col,
584	            ),
585	            None => (intersection_glyph(false, style).to_string(), TuiStyle::default(), false),
586	        };
587	
588	        spans.push(Span::styled(content, st));
589	
590	        // Connector to next cell or trailing pad on last cell
591	        if display_col + 1 < cols {
592	            let connector = horizontal_connector(is_piece_or_glyph, style);
593	            spans.push(Span::styled(connector, border_style));
594	        } else if !is_piece_or_glyph {
595	            // Last cell with 1-col content: pad to 2 cols so all rows have
596	            // a consistent total width.
597	            spans.push(Span::raw(" "));
598	        }
599	    }
600	
601	    Line::from(spans)
602	}
603	
604	/// Per-cell content for a rank row.
605	/// Returns `(content_str, content_style, content_is_glyph_width_2)`.
606	/// `content_is_glyph_width_2` is true for revealed pieces and hidden banqi
607	/// pieces (which use a 2-col glyph); false for empty intersections (1 col).
608	#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
609	fn intersection_or_piece(
610	    view: &PlayerView,
611	    sq: Square,
612	    model_w: u8,
613	    shape: BoardShape,
614	    highlight: &std::collections::HashSet<Square>,
615	    cursor: (u8, u8),
616	    selected: Option<Square>,
617	    style: Style,
618	    use_color: bool,
619	    display_row: u8,
620	    display_col: u8,
621	) -> (String, TuiStyle, bool) {
622	    let cell = &view.cells[sq.0 as usize];
623	    let is_cursor = (display_row, display_col) == cursor;
624	    let is_selected = selected == Some(sq);
625	    let is_target = highlight.contains(&sq);
626	    // Engine 連吃 chain mode: the locked piece gets a distinct
627	    // orange-ish highlight so the user sees that it's the engine
628	    // forcing this selection (not their own click) and can recall
629	    // that Esc / Enter on it ends the chain.
630	    let is_chain_locked = view.chain_lock == Some(sq);
631	
632	    let (text, is_glyph_w2) = match cell {
633	        VisibleCell::Empty => {
634	            let palace_center = is_palace_center(sq, model_w, shape);
635	            (intersection_glyph(palace_center, style).to_string(), false)
636	        }
637	        VisibleCell::Hidden => (glyph::hidden(style).to_string(), true),
638	        VisibleCell::Revealed(pos) => {
639	            (glyph::glyph(pos.piece.kind, pos.piece.side, style).to_string(), true)
640	        }
641	    };
642	
643	    let mut s = TuiStyle::default();
644	    if use_color {
645	        if let VisibleCell::Revealed(pos) = cell {
646	            s = s.fg(side_color(pos.piece.side));
647	            if !pos.revealed {
648	                s = s.add_modifier(Modifier::DIM);
649	            }
650	            if pos.piece.kind == PieceKind::General {
651	                s = s.add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD);
652	            }
653	        } else if matches!(cell, VisibleCell::Hidden) {
654	            s = s.fg(Color::DarkGray);
655	        } else if is_palace_center(sq, model_w, shape) {
656	            s = s.fg(Color::Yellow);
657	        } else {
658	            s = s.fg(Color::DarkGray);
659	        }
660	    }
661	    if is_target {
662	        s = s.bg(Color::Rgb(40, 80, 40));
663	    }
664	    if is_selected {
665	        // Brown for a regular user-driven selection, brighter orange
666	        // when the same square is also the chain-lock (engine-driven).
667	        let bg = if is_chain_locked { Color::Rgb(140, 80, 20) } else { Color::Rgb(80, 60, 20) };
668	        s = s.bg(bg).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD);
669	    }
670	    if is_cursor {
671	        s = s.bg(Color::Rgb(60, 60, 100)).add_modifier(Modifier::REVERSED);
672	    }
673	    (text, s, is_glyph_w2)
674	}
675	
676	fn is_palace_center(sq: Square, model_w: u8, shape: BoardShape) -> bool {
677	    if !matches!(shape, BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10) {
678	        return false;
679	    }
680	    let f = (sq.0 % model_w as u16) as u8;
681	    let r = (sq.0 / model_w as u16) as u8;
682	    f == 4 && (r == 1 || r == 8)
683	}
684	
685	fn intersection_glyph(palace_center: bool, style: Style) -> &'static str {
686	    match (palace_center, style) {
687	        (true, Style::Cjk) => "╳",
688	        (true, Style::Ascii) => "X",
689	        (false, Style::Cjk) => "┼",
690	        (false, Style::Ascii) => "+",
691	    }
692	}
693	
694	fn horizontal_connector(content_is_w2: bool, style: Style) -> &'static str {
695	    let dash: char = match style {
696	        Style::Cjk => '─',
697	        Style::Ascii => '-',
698	    };
699	    if content_is_w2 {
700	        // 2-col content (piece) leaves 2 cols for connector.
701	        match dash {
702	            '─' => "──",
703	            _ => "--",
704	        }
705	    } else {
706	        // 1-col content (intersection) leaves 3 cols for connector.
707	        match dash {
708	            '─' => "───",
709	            _ => "---",
710	        }
711	    }
712	}
713	
714	fn between_row(
715	    observer: Side,
716	    shape: BoardShape,
717	    display_row_above: u8,
718	    cols: u8,
719	    style: Style,
720	    border_style: TuiStyle,
721	) -> Line<'static> {
722	    let vbar: char = match style {
723	        Style::Cjk => '│',
724	        Style::Ascii => '|',
725	    };
726	    let diagonals = palace_diagonals(display_row_above, observer, shape, style);
727	
728	    let mut s = String::from("   "); // rank label
729	    for cell_idx in 0..cols {
730	        s.push(vbar);
731	        if cell_idx + 1 < cols {
732	            // 3-space gap, possibly with a diagonal char in the middle
733	            // for palace between-rows. cell_idx is the index of the LEFT
734	            // cell of the gap. Diagonals appear between cells (3, 4) and (4, 5).
735	            let diag_char = match (diagonals, cell_idx) {
736	                (Some((left_diag, _)), 3) => Some(left_diag),
737	                (Some((_, right_diag)), 4) => Some(right_diag),
738	                _ => None,
739	            };
740	            match diag_char {
741	                Some(c) => {
742	                    s.push(' ');
743	                    s.push(c);
744	                    s.push(' ');
745	                }
746	                None => s.push_str("   "),
747	            }
748	        }
749	    }
750	    // Trailing space so the row width matches rank rows (34 cols of content
751	    // + 3 of rank label).
752	    s.push(' ');
753	    Line::from(Span::styled(s, border_style))
754	}
755	
756	/// For a between-row sitting between display rows N and N+1, returns the
757	/// (left, right) diagonal characters if this between-row crosses a palace.
758	/// Otherwise None.
759	fn palace_diagonals(
760	    display_row_above: u8,
761	    observer: Side,
762	    shape: BoardShape,
763	    style: Style,
764	) -> Option<(char, char)> {
765	    if !matches!(shape, BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10) {
766	        return None;
767	    }
768	    let top_sq = orient::square_at_display(display_row_above, 4, observer, shape)?;
769	    let bot_sq = orient::square_at_display(display_row_above + 1, 4, observer, shape)?;
770	    let top_rank = (top_sq.0 / 9) as u8;
771	    let bot_rank = (bot_sq.0 / 9) as u8;
772	    let (low, high) = if top_rank < bot_rank { (top_rank, bot_rank) } else { (bot_rank, top_rank) };
773	
774	    let center_rank = match (low, high) {
775	        (0, 1) | (1, 2) => 1u8,
776	        (7, 8) | (8, 9) => 8u8,
777	        _ => return None,
778	    };
779	
780	    let top_dist = (top_rank as i32 - center_rank as i32).abs();
781	    let bot_dist = (bot_rank as i32 - center_rank as i32).abs();
782	    let converging = bot_dist < top_dist;
783	
784	    let (left_cjk, right_cjk) = if converging { ('╲', '╱') } else { ('╱', '╲') };
785	    let (left, right) = match style {
786	        Style::Cjk => (left_cjk, right_cjk),
787	        Style::Ascii => (if converging { '\\' } else { '/' }, if converging { '/' } else { '\\' }),
788	    };
789	    Some((left, right))
790	}
791	
792	fn river_line(cols: u8, style: Style) -> Line<'static> {
793	    // The river replaces the between-row entirely; there are no vertical
794	    // bars connecting through it. Total width must match a rank row:
795	    //   rank label (3) + grid (cols * 4 - 2) + trailing pad to align.
796	    let target_width = (cols as usize) * 4 - 2;
797	    let banner = match style {
798	        Style::Cjk => "〇 楚 河 ── 漢 界 〇",
799	        Style::Ascii => "~ river -- river ~",
800	    };
801	    let mut s = String::from("   "); // rank label
802	    let banner_w = visual_width(banner);
803	    let pad = target_width.saturating_sub(banner_w);
804	    let left_pad = pad / 2;
805	    let right_pad = pad - left_pad;
806	    for _ in 0..left_pad {
807	        s.push(' ');
808	    }
809	    s.push_str(banner);
810	    for _ in 0..right_pad {
811	        s.push(' ');
812	    }
813	    Line::from(Span::styled(s, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Cyan).add_modifier(Modifier::DIM)))
814	}
815	
816	/// Approximate display width: CJK chars count as 2 cols, others as 1.
817	fn visual_width(s: &str) -> usize {
818	    s.chars()
819	        .map(|c| {
820	            let cp = c as u32;
821	            // East Asian Wide ranges (rough). Covers CJK Unified, Hangul,
822	            // box-drawing isn't wide. This is "good enough" — a real fix
823	            // would pull in unicode-width.
824	            if (0x1100..=0x115F).contains(&cp)
825	                || (0x2E80..=0x303E).contains(&cp)
826	                || (0x3041..=0x33FF).contains(&cp)
827	                || (0x3400..=0x4DBF).contains(&cp)
828	                || (0x4E00..=0x9FFF).contains(&cp)
829	                || (0xA000..=0xA4CF).contains(&cp)
830	                || (0xAC00..=0xD7A3).contains(&cp)
831	                || (0xF900..=0xFAFF).contains(&cp)
832	                || (0xFE30..=0xFE4F).contains(&cp)
833	                || (0xFF00..=0xFF60).contains(&cp)
834	                || (0xFFE0..=0xFFE6).contains(&cp)
835	            {
836	                2
837	            } else {
838	                1
839	            }
840	        })
841	        .sum()
842	}
843	
844	fn file_header_line(observer: Side, shape: BoardShape) -> Line<'static> {
845	    let (w, _) = shape.dimensions();
846	    let (_, cols) = orient::display_dims(shape);
847	    // Each cell takes 4 cols (label at col 0, then 3 spaces). Last cell
848	    // has just the label + 1 trailing space to match rank-row width.
849	    let mut s = String::from("   "); // rank label
850	    for display_col in 0..cols {
851	        let label = file_label_for_col(display_col, w, shape, observer);
852	        s.push(label);
853	        if display_col + 1 < cols {
854	            s.push_str("   ");
855	        } else {
856	            s.push(' '); // trailing pad
857	        }
858	    }
859	    Line::from(Span::styled(s, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)))
860	}
861	
862	fn file_label_for_col(col: u8, model_w: u8, shape: BoardShape, observer: Side) -> char {
863	    let sq = orient::square_at_display(0, col, observer, shape);
864	    match (shape, sq) {
865	        // Banqi displays transposed (8 cols × 4 rows). Display columns
866	        // therefore correspond to model RANKS (0–7), and rows to files (a–d).
867	        (BoardShape::Banqi4x8, Some(sq)) => {
868	            let r = (sq.0 / model_w as u16) as u8;
869	            (b'0' + r) as char
870	        }
871	        (_, Some(sq)) => {
872	            let f = (sq.0 % model_w as u16) as u8;
873	            (b'a' + f) as char
874	        }
875	        _ => '?',
876	    }
877	}
878	
879	fn rank_label(observer: Side, shape: BoardShape, display_row: u8) -> String {
880	    let sq = orient::square_at_display(display_row, 0, observer, shape);
881	    let model_w = shape.dimensions().0;
882	    match (shape, sq) {
883	        (BoardShape::Banqi4x8, Some(sq)) => {
884	            // Banqi rows = model files; show as a–d.
885	            let f = (sq.0 % model_w as u16) as u8;
886	            format!(" {} ", (b'a' + f) as char)
887	        }
888	        (_, Some(sq)) => {
889	            let r = (sq.0 / model_w as u16) as u8;
890	            format!(" {} ", r)
891	        }
892	        _ => "   ".to_string(),
893	    }
894	}
895	
896	fn side_color(side: Side) -> Color {
897	    match side {
898	        Side::RED => Color::Red,
899	        Side::BLACK => Color::White,
900	        _ => Color::Green,
901	    }
902	}
903	
904	/// Append the "Captured pieces" block to `lines`. Two rows
905	/// (Red / Black) of glyph spans coloured by side. Compact layout
906	/// designed for the 36-col sidebar; long lists wrap via the parent
907	/// `Paragraph::wrap`. The header echoes the active sort label so the
908	/// user can see at a glance whether they're in time- or rank-mode.
909	fn push_captured_lines(
910	    lines: &mut Vec<Line<'static>>,
911	    captured: &[chess_core::piece::Piece],
912	    sort: CapturedSort,
913	    style: Style,
914	) {
915	    let header = format!("Captured ({}):", sort.label());
916	    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(header, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray))));
917	
918	    let (red, black) = app::split_and_sort_captured(captured, sort);
919	    lines.push(captured_row(" R 紅:", &red, Color::Red, style));
920	    lines.push(captured_row(" B 黑:", &black, Color::Gray, style));
921	}
922	
923	fn captured_row(
924	    label: &'static str,
925	    pieces: &[chess_core::piece::Piece],
926	    color: Color,
927	    style: Style,
928	) -> Line<'static> {
929	    let mut spans: Vec<Span<'static>> = Vec::with_capacity(pieces.len() * 2 + 2);
930	    spans.push(Span::styled(label, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)));
931	    if pieces.is_empty() {
932	        spans.push(Span::styled(" —", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)));
933	    } else {
934	        for p in pieces {
935	            spans.push(Span::raw(" "));
936	            let g = glyph::glyph(p.kind, p.side, style);
937	            spans.push(Span::styled(
938	                g.to_string(),
939	                TuiStyle::default().fg(color).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
940	            ));
941	        }
942	    }
943	    Line::from(spans)
944	}
945	
946	#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
947	fn draw_sidebar(
948	    frame: &mut Frame,
949	    area: Rect,
950	    g: &GameView,
951	    view: &PlayerView,
952	    style: Style,
953	    help_open: bool,
954	    show_check_banner: bool,
955	    captured_sort: CapturedSort,
956	) {
957	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Status ");
958	    let inner = block.inner(area);
959	    frame.render_widget(block, area);
960	
961	    let mut lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::new();
962	
963	    // Game-over banner (takes priority).
964	    if let Some(banner) = game_over_banner(&view.status, style) {
965	        for l in banner {
966	            lines.push(l);
967	        }
968	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
969	    }
970	
971	    let variant_label = match view.shape {
972	        BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10 => {
973	            // Casual is the TUI default; strict is the alternative.
974	            if g.state.rules.xiangqi_allow_self_check {
975	                "Xiangqi (象棋)"
976	            } else {
977	                "Xiangqi (象棋, strict)"
978	            }
979	        }
980	        BoardShape::Banqi4x8 => "Banqi (暗棋)",
981	        BoardShape::ThreeKingdom => "三國暗棋",
982	        BoardShape::Custom { .. } => "Custom",
983	    };
984	    lines.push(line_label_value("Variant:", variant_label));
985	
986	    // Side-to-move only makes sense while the game is ongoing; once it's
987	    // Won/Drawn the banner above already shows the winner. Display the
988	    // piece-colour (`current_color`), which diverges from `side_to_move`
989	    // (the seat) after a banqi first-flip.
990	    if matches!(view.status, GameStatus::Ongoing) {
991	        let stm_color = side_color(view.current_color);
992	        lines.push(Line::from(vec![
993	            Span::styled("Side to move:", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
994	            Span::raw(" "),
995	            Span::styled(
996	                glyph::side_name(view.current_color, style),
997	                TuiStyle::default().fg(stm_color).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
998	            ),
999	        ]));
1000	
1001	        if show_check_banner
1002	            && matches!(view.shape, BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10)
1003	            && g.state.is_in_check(view.side_to_move)
1004	        {
1005	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1006	                "  ⚠ CHECK 將軍 — your general is under attack",
1007	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Red).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1008	            )));
1009	        }
1010	    }
1011	
1012	    let (status_text, status_color) = format_status_short(view.status, style);
1013	    lines.push(Line::from(vec![
1014	        Span::styled("Status:", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
1015	        Span::raw(" "),
1016	        Span::styled(status_text, TuiStyle::default().fg(status_color)),
1017	    ]));
1018	    lines.push(line_label_value("Legal moves:", &view.legal_moves.len().to_string()));
1019	    lines.push(line_label_value("History:", &g.state.history.len().to_string()));
1020	
1021	    let selected_label = match g.selected {
1022	        Some(sq) => chess_core::notation::iccs::encode_square(&g.state.board, sq),
1023	        None => "—".into(),
1024	    };
1025	    lines.push(line_label_value("Selected:", &selected_label));
1026	
1027	    if let Some(lock) = view.chain_lock {
1028	        let sq_label = chess_core::notation::iccs::encode_square(&g.state.board, lock);
1029	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1030	            format!("⛓ 連吃 chain on {sq_label}"),
1031	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Rgb(245, 166, 35)).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1032	        )));
1033	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1034	            "  Enter / click locked = end chain · Esc = end · capture target = continue",
1035	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Rgb(245, 166, 35)),
1036	        )));
1037	    }
1038	
1039	    push_captured_lines(&mut lines, &view.captured, captured_sort, style);
1040	
1041	    lines.push(Line::from(""));
1042	    if let Some(msg) = &g.last_msg {
1043	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(msg.clone(), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow))));
1044	    }
1045	
1046	    if help_open {
1047	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
1048	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1049	            "Help",
1050	            TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1051	        )));
1052	        for ln in HELP_LINES {
1053	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::raw(*ln)));
1054	        }
1055	    } else {
1056	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
1057	        if let Some(ci) = &g.coord_input {
1058	            lines.push(Line::from(vec![
1059	                Span::styled("> ", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
1060	                Span::styled(format!("{}_", ci.buf), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
1061	            ]));
1062	        } else {
1063	            // Banqi adds an `f=flip` hint (and an inline 暗 reminder
1064	            // when the cursor is on a face-down tile) so newcomers
1065	            // don't get stuck pressing Enter on 暗 wondering why
1066	            // nothing happens.
1067	            let is_banqi = matches!(view.shape, BoardShape::Banqi4x8);
1068	            let hint = if is_banqi {
1069	                "?=help, f=flip 暗, r=rules, : / m=coord, g=captured, n=new, q=quit"
1070	            } else {
1071	                "?=help, r=rules, : / m=coord, g=captured, n=new, q=quit"
1072	            };
1073	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(hint, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray))));
1074	
1075	            if is_banqi {
1076	                let cursor_sq =
1077	                    orient::square_at_display(g.cursor.0, g.cursor.1, view.observer, view.shape);
1078	                if cursor_sq
1079	                    .is_some_and(|sq| matches!(view.cells[sq.0 as usize], VisibleCell::Hidden))
1080	                {
1081	                    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1082	                        "  ↑ press f to flip this 暗 tile",
1083	                        TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow),
1084	                    )));
1085	                }
1086	            }
1087	        }
1088	    }
1089	
1090	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
1091	    frame.render_widget(para, inner);
1092	}
1093	
1094	#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
1095	fn draw_sidebar_net(
1096	    frame: &mut Frame,
1097	    area: Rect,
1098	    n: &NetView,
1099	    view: &PlayerView,
1100	    style: Style,
1101	    help_open: bool,
1102	    show_check_banner: bool,
1103	    captured_sort: CapturedSort,
1104	) {
1105	    let block = Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Status (net) ");
1106	    let inner = block.inner(area);
1107	    frame.render_widget(block, area);
1108	
1109	    // Split the sidebar into "meta info" (top) and "chat region" (bottom).
1110	    // The chat region keeps a scrolling log + a single input row when the
1111	    // user is composing. Meta height is dynamic (grows to fit) and chat
1112	    // gets the rest.
1113	    let chat_input_active = n.chat_input.is_some();
1114	    let chat_h = inner.height.saturating_sub(MIN_META_ROWS).max(MIN_CHAT_ROWS);
1115	    let meta_h = inner.height.saturating_sub(chat_h);
1116	    let chunks = Layout::default()
1117	        .direction(Direction::Vertical)
1118	        .constraints([Constraint::Length(meta_h), Constraint::Length(chat_h)])
1119	        .split(inner);
1120	
1121	    let mut lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::new();
1122	
1123	    if let Some(banner) = game_over_banner(&view.status, style) {
1124	        for l in banner {
1125	            lines.push(l);
1126	        }
1127	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
1128	    }
1129	
1130	    let variant_label = match (view.shape, n.rules.as_ref()) {
1131	        (BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10, Some(r)) => {
1132	            if r.xiangqi_allow_self_check {
1133	                "Xiangqi (象棋)"
1134	            } else {
1135	                "Xiangqi (象棋, strict)"
1136	            }
1137	        }
1138	        (BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10, None) => "Xiangqi (象棋)",
1139	        (BoardShape::Banqi4x8, _) => "Banqi (暗棋)",
1140	        (BoardShape::ThreeKingdom, _) => "三國暗棋",
1141	        (BoardShape::Custom { .. }, _) => "Custom",
1142	    };
1143	    lines.push(line_label_value("Variant:", variant_label));
1144	
1145	    match n.role {
1146	        Some(NetRole::Player(side)) => {
1147	            let c = side_color(side);
1148	            lines.push(Line::from(vec![
1149	                Span::styled("You:", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
1150	                Span::raw(" "),
1151	                Span::styled(
1152	                    glyph::side_name(side, style),
1153	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(c).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1154	                ),
1155	            ]));
1156	        }
1157	        Some(NetRole::Spectator) => {
1158	            lines.push(Line::from(vec![
1159	                Span::styled("You:", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
1160	                Span::raw(" "),
1161	                Span::styled(
1162	                    "Spectator (read-only)",
1163	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1164	                ),
1165	            ]));
1166	        }
1167	        None => {}
1168	    }
1169	
1170	    if matches!(view.status, GameStatus::Ongoing) {
1171	        // "Your turn?" depends on the observer's SEAT (side_to_move) but
1172	        // the displayed colour is the piece-colour the seat plays
1173	        // (`current_color`). For banqi the two diverge after the first
1174	        // flip; for xiangqi they're identical.
1175	        let stm_color = side_color(view.current_color);
1176	        let observer_side = n.role.and_then(|r| match r {
1177	            NetRole::Player(s) => Some(s),
1178	            NetRole::Spectator => None,
1179	        });
1180	        let label = match observer_side {
1181	            Some(obs) if obs == view.side_to_move => "Your turn:",
1182	            Some(_) => "Opponent:",
1183	            None => "To move:",
1184	        };
1185	        lines.push(Line::from(vec![
1186	            Span::styled(label, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
1187	            Span::raw(" "),
1188	            Span::styled(
1189	                glyph::side_name(view.current_color, style),
1190	                TuiStyle::default().fg(stm_color).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1191	            ),
1192	        ]));
1193	
1194	        // Check banner: `view.in_check` is set by the server in v4+ from the
1195	        // observer's POV (or Red's POV for spectators). So Players read it
1196	        // as "my own general"; Spectators read it as "Red's general".
1197	        if show_check_banner && matches!(view.shape, BoardShape::Xiangqi9x10) && view.in_check {
1198	            let msg = match n.role {
1199	                Some(NetRole::Player(_)) => "  ⚠ CHECK 將軍 — your general is under attack",
1200	                Some(NetRole::Spectator) => "  ⚠ CHECK 將軍 — Red's general is under attack",
1201	                None => "  ⚠ CHECK 將軍",
1202	            };
1203	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1204	                msg,
1205	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Red).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1206	            )));
1207	        }
1208	    }
1209	
1210	    let (status_text, status_color) = format_status_short(view.status, style);
1211	    lines.push(Line::from(vec![
1212	        Span::styled("Status:", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
1213	        Span::raw(" "),
1214	        Span::styled(status_text, TuiStyle::default().fg(status_color)),
1215	    ]));
1216	    lines.push(line_label_value("Legal moves:", &view.legal_moves.len().to_string()));
1217	
1218	    let selected_label = match n.selected {
1219	        Some(sq) => format!("sq {}", sq.0),
1220	        None => "—".into(),
1221	    };
1222	    lines.push(line_label_value("Selected:", &selected_label));
1223	
1224	    if let Some(lock) = view.chain_lock {
1225	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1226	            format!("⛓ 連吃 chain on sq {}", lock.0),
1227	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Rgb(245, 166, 35)).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1228	        )));
1229	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1230	            "  Enter / click locked = end · Esc = end · target = continue",
1231	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Rgb(245, 166, 35)),
1232	        )));
1233	    }
1234	
1235	    push_captured_lines(&mut lines, &view.captured, captured_sort, style);
1236	
1237	    lines.push(line_label_value("Server:", &n.url));
1238	    lines.push(line_label_value("Connection:", if n.connected { "live" } else { "disconnected" }));
1239	
1240	    lines.push(Line::from(""));
1241	    if let Some(msg) = &n.last_msg {
1242	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(msg.clone(), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow))));
1243	    }
1244	
1245	    if help_open {
1246	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
1247	        lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1248	            "Help",
1249	            TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1250	        )));
1251	        for ln in HELP_LINES_NET {
1252	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::raw(*ln)));
1253	        }
1254	    } else {
1255	        lines.push(Line::from(""));
1256	        if let Some(ci) = &n.coord_input {
1257	            lines.push(Line::from(vec![
1258	                Span::styled("> ", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
1259	                Span::styled(format!("{}_", ci.buf), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
1260	            ]));
1261	        } else {
1262	            let is_banqi = matches!(view.shape, BoardShape::Banqi4x8);
1263	            let hint = if is_banqi {
1264	                "?=help, f=flip 暗, r=rules, t=chat, : / m=coord, g=captured, q=quit"
1265	            } else {
1266	                "?=help, r=rules, t=chat, : / m=coord, g=captured, q=quit"
1267	            };
1268	            lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(hint, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray))));
1269	
1270	            if is_banqi {
1271	                let observer = n.role.map(|r| r.observer()).unwrap_or(Side::RED);
1272	                let cursor_sq =
1273	                    orient::square_at_display(n.cursor.0, n.cursor.1, observer, view.shape);
1274	                if cursor_sq
1275	                    .is_some_and(|sq| matches!(view.cells[sq.0 as usize], VisibleCell::Hidden))
1276	                {
1277	                    lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1278	                        "  ↑ press f to flip this 暗 tile",
1279	                        TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow),
1280	                    )));
1281	                }
1282	            }
1283	        }
1284	    }
1285	
1286	    let meta_para = Paragraph::new(lines).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
1287	    frame.render_widget(meta_para, chunks[0]);
1288	
1289	    draw_chat_pane(frame, chunks[1], n, chat_input_active);
1290	}
1291	
1292	const MIN_META_ROWS: u16 = 17;
1293	const MIN_CHAT_ROWS: u16 = 6;
1294	
1295	fn draw_chat_pane(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, n: &NetView, input_active: bool) {
1296	    let block = Block::default()
1297	        .borders(Borders::TOP)
1298	        .border_style(TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray))
1299	        .title(" Chat ");
1300	    let inner = block.inner(area);
1301	    frame.render_widget(block, area);
1302	    if inner.height == 0 {
1303	        return;
1304	    }
1305	
1306	    // Reserve the bottom row for the input prompt (or hint when not typing).
1307	    let log_h = inner.height.saturating_sub(1);
1308	    let log_area = Rect { x: inner.x, y: inner.y, width: inner.width, height: log_h };
1309	    let input_area = Rect { x: inner.x, y: inner.y + log_h, width: inner.width, height: 1 };
1310	
1311	    let visible = log_h as usize;
1312	    // Show the most recent N lines (cap by visible height) so the buffer
1313	    // stays scrolled to the bottom on every render.
1314	    let start = n.chat.len().saturating_sub(visible);
1315	    let mut log_lines: Vec<Line> = Vec::with_capacity(visible);
1316	    if n.chat.is_empty() {
1317	        log_lines.push(Line::from(Span::styled(
1318	            "(no messages yet)",
1319	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray),
1320	        )));
1321	    } else {
1322	        for line in n.chat.iter().skip(start) {
1323	            log_lines.push(format_chat_line(line));
1324	        }
1325	    }
1326	    let log_para = Paragraph::new(log_lines).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
1327	    frame.render_widget(log_para, log_area);
1328	
1329	    let input_line = if input_active {
1330	        let buf = n.chat_input.as_deref().unwrap_or("");
1331	        Line::from(vec![
1332	            Span::styled("> ", TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
1333	            Span::styled(format!("{}_", buf), TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow)),
1334	        ])
1335	    } else {
1336	        let hint = match n.role {
1337	            Some(NetRole::Spectator) => "(spectator — read-only)",
1338	            Some(NetRole::Player(_)) => "Press 't' to chat.",
1339	            None => "",
1340	        };
1341	        Line::from(Span::styled(hint, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)))
1342	    };
1343	    frame.render_widget(Paragraph::new(input_line).wrap(Wrap { trim: false }), input_area);
1344	}
1345	
1346	fn format_chat_line(line: &chess_net::ChatLine) -> Line<'static> {
1347	    let from_label = match line.from {
1348	        Side::RED => "Red:",
1349	        Side::BLACK => "Black:",
1350	        _ => "Green:",
1351	    };
1352	    let from_color = side_color(line.from);
1353	    Line::from(vec![
1354	        Span::styled(
1355	            from_label.to_string(),
1356	            TuiStyle::default().fg(from_color).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1357	        ),
1358	        Span::raw(" "),
1359	        Span::raw(line.text.clone()),
1360	    ])
1361	}
1362	
1363	const HELP_LINES_NET: &[&str] = &[
1364	    "h j k l / ←↓↑→  move cursor",
1365	    "Enter / Space   select / commit (sends Move to server)",
1366	    "Esc             cancel selection",
1367	    ":               coord input (instant): type ICCS (h2e2 / flip a0), Enter sends",
1368	    "m               coord input (live preview): same, with selected/cursor preview",
1369	    "f               flip (banqi)",
1370	    "n               request rematch (after game over; needs both sides)",
1371	    "t               open chat input (players only; Enter sends, Esc cancels)",
1372	    "g               toggle captured-pieces sort (time / rank)",
1373	    "r               toggle rules overlay",
1374	    "?               toggle this help",
1375	    "Click           select / commit",
1376	    "q / Ctrl-C      quit (closes the connection)",
1377	    "(undo not supported online yet)",
1378	];
1379	
1380	/// Map a Local game's outcome to the kind of big banner to draw. Local
1381	/// (hot-seat) play gets neutral "RED WINS / BLACK WINS / DRAW" copy
1382	/// because both seats share the same screen — calling either side
1383	/// "VICTORY" or "DEFEAT" would be misleading. Returns `None` while the
1384	/// game is still ongoing or for unsupported variants.
1385	fn endgame_kind_local(status: &GameStatus, _observer: Side) -> Option<BannerKind> {
1386	    match status {
1387	        GameStatus::Ongoing => None,
1388	        GameStatus::Won { winner, .. } => Some(BannerKind::Outcome(neutral_side_for(*winner))),
1389	        GameStatus::Drawn { .. } => Some(BannerKind::Draw),
1390	    }
1391	}
1392	
1393	/// Map a Net game's outcome. Players see VICTORY/DEFEAT keyed off their
1394	/// own seat; spectators always see the neutral RED WINS / BLACK WINS
1395	/// copy. Returns `None` while ongoing or before the role handshake.
1396	fn endgame_kind_net(status: &GameStatus, role: Option<NetRole>) -> Option<BannerKind> {
1397	    match (status, role) {
1398	        (GameStatus::Ongoing, _) => None,
1399	        (GameStatus::Drawn { .. }, _) => Some(BannerKind::Draw),
1400	        (GameStatus::Won { winner, .. }, Some(NetRole::Player(seat))) => {
1401	            if *winner == seat {
1402	                Some(BannerKind::Victory)
1403	            } else {
1404	                Some(BannerKind::Defeat)
1405	            }
1406	        }
1407	        (GameStatus::Won { winner, .. }, Some(NetRole::Spectator) | None) => {
1408	            Some(BannerKind::Outcome(neutral_side_for(*winner)))
1409	        }
1410	    }
1411	}
1412	
1413	fn neutral_side_for(side: Side) -> NeutralSide {
1414	    match side {
1415	        Side::RED => NeutralSide::Red,
1416	        Side::BLACK => NeutralSide::Black,
1417	        _ => NeutralSide::Green,
1418	    }
1419	}
1420	
1421	/// Render a confetti burst + centered ASCII banner over the board area
1422	/// during the post-game "look at this" window.
1423	///
1424	/// The trigger lives elsewhere (`AppState::note_status_transition`); this
1425	/// function only consumes the `confetti_pending` flag and the active
1426	/// `confetti_anim`. While an animation is alive we also render the
1427	/// matching big banner; once the animation expires both go away and the
1428	/// sidebar's existing `game_over_banner` is left as the persistent cue.
1429	///
1430	/// Skipped entirely when the user disabled FX (`--no-confetti`) — the
1431	/// pending flag is never armed in that case, so this function is a no-op.
1432	fn render_confetti_and_banner(
1433	    frame: &mut Frame,
1434	    board_area: Rect,
1435	    app: &mut AppState,
1436	    endgame_kind: Option<BannerKind>,
1437	    style: Style,
1438	    use_color: bool,
1439	) {
1440	    // Spawn a fresh burst if the trigger fired since the last frame. The
1441	    // sub-rect must be inside the board widget so particles land where the
1442	    // user is already looking.
1443	    if app.confetti_pending && app.confetti_anim.is_none() {
1444	        app.confetti_anim = Some(ConfettiAnim::spawn(board_area));
1445	        app.confetti_pending = false;
1446	    }
1447	
1448	    // Draw the big banner first (before particles overwrite cells), but
1449	    // only while the animation is alive so it auto-clears with the burst.
1450	    let anim_alive = app.confetti_anim.is_some();
1451	    if anim_alive {
1452	        if let Some(kind) = endgame_kind {
1453	            render_big_banner(frame, board_area, kind, style, use_color);
1454	        }
1455	    }
1456	
1457	    // Step + render particles. `step` advances physics and drops offscreen
1458	    // particles; `render` paints into the frame's buffer cells. When `done`,
1459	    // clear the slot so the next frame stops animating.
1460	    if let Some(anim) = app.confetti_anim.as_mut() {
1461	        let done = anim.step(board_area);
1462	        anim.render(frame.buffer_mut(), board_area, use_color);
1463	        if done {
1464	            app.confetti_anim = None;
1465	        }
1466	    }
1467	}
1468	
1469	/// Centre the ASCII art in `area`. If `area` is too narrow to fit the
1470	/// banner with reasonable padding, we silently skip the banner (confetti
1471	/// alone still plays). The kind's color is chosen for emotional read:
1472	/// yellow for VICTORY (excitement), red for DEFEAT (loss), magenta for
1473	/// DRAW (neutral but not muted), red for CHECK.
1474	fn render_big_banner(
1475	    frame: &mut Frame,
1476	    area: Rect,
1477	    kind: BannerKind,
1478	    style: Style,
1479	    use_color: bool,
1480	) {
1481	    let rows = banner::art(kind, style);
1482	    let banner_w = banner::max_width(rows) as u16;
1483	    let banner_h = rows.len() as u16;
1484	    if area.width < banner_w + 2 || area.height < banner_h + 2 {
1485	        return;
1486	    }
1487	    let x = area.x + (area.width.saturating_sub(banner_w)) / 2;
1488	    let y = area.y + (area.height.saturating_sub(banner_h)) / 2;
1489	    let sub = Rect { x, y, width: banner_w, height: banner_h };
1490	
1491	    let color = if !use_color {
1492	        Color::Reset
1493	    } else {
1494	        match kind {
1495	            BannerKind::Victory => Color::Yellow,
1496	            BannerKind::Defeat => Color::Red,
1497	            BannerKind::Draw => Color::Magenta,
1498	            BannerKind::Outcome(_) => Color::Yellow,
1499	            BannerKind::AppTitle => Color::Yellow,
1500	        }
1501	    };
1502	
1503	    let lines: Vec<Line> = rows
1504	        .iter()
1505	        .map(|r| {
1506	            Line::from(Span::styled(
1507	                r.to_string(),
1508	                TuiStyle::default().fg(color).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1509	            ))
1510	        })
1511	        .collect();
1512	
1513	    // Clear the cells under the banner so the board glyphs don't bleed
1514	    // through. The Clear widget wipes to default style, then Paragraph
1515	    // writes the banner text.
1516	    frame.render_widget(Clear, sub);
1517	    frame.render_widget(Paragraph::new(lines), sub);
1518	}
1519	
1520	fn game_over_banner(status: &GameStatus, style: Style) -> Option<Vec<Line<'static>>> {
1521	    match status {
1522	        GameStatus::Ongoing => None,
1523	        GameStatus::Won { winner, reason } => {
1524	            let header = Line::from(Span::styled(
1525	                "★  GAME OVER  ★",
1526	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1527	            ));
1528	            let winner_line = Line::from(vec![
1529	                Span::raw("Winner: "),
1530	                Span::styled(
1531	                    glyph::side_name(*winner, style),
1532	                    TuiStyle::default().fg(side_color(*winner)).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1533	                ),
1534	            ]);
1535	            let reason_line = Line::from(vec![
1536	                Span::raw("Reason: "),
1537	                Span::styled(
1538	                    win_reason_label(*reason),
1539	                    TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1540	                ),
1541	            ]);
1542	            let footer = Line::from(Span::styled(
1543	                "Press 'n' for new game, 'u' to take back, 'q' to quit.",
1544	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Cyan),
1545	            ));
1546	            Some(vec![header, winner_line, reason_line, footer])
1547	        }
1548	        GameStatus::Drawn { reason } => {
1549	            let header = Line::from(Span::styled(
1550	                "—  DRAW  —",
1551	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1552	            ));
1553	            let reason_line = Line::from(vec![
1554	                Span::raw("Reason: "),
1555	                Span::styled(
1556	                    format!("{:?}", reason),
1557	                    TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1558	                ),
1559	            ]);
1560	            let footer = Line::from(Span::styled(
1561	                "Press 'n' for new game, 'u' to take back, 'q' to quit.",
1562	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Cyan),
1563	            ));
1564	            Some(vec![header, reason_line, footer])
1565	        }
1566	    }
1567	}
1568	
1569	fn win_reason_label(reason: WinReason) -> &'static str {
1570	    match reason {
1571	        WinReason::Checkmate => "Checkmate (將死)",
1572	        WinReason::Stalemate => "Stalemate (困死) — no legal moves",
1573	        WinReason::Resignation => "Resignation",
1574	        WinReason::OnlyOneSideHasPieces => "Opponent eliminated",
1575	        WinReason::Timeout => "Time forfeit",
1576	        WinReason::GeneralCaptured => "General captured (將被吃)",
1577	    }
1578	}
1579	
1580	/// Compact, human-readable rendering of `GameStatus` for the sidebar's
1581	/// `Status:` line. Returns `(text, color)`. Engine `Debug` repr leaks
1582	/// `Side(0)` etc. and reads as noise to a player.
1583	fn format_status_short(status: GameStatus, style: Style) -> (String, Color) {
1584	    match status {
1585	        GameStatus::Ongoing => ("Ongoing".to_string(), Color::Gray),
1586	        GameStatus::Won { winner, reason } => (
1587	            format!("{} wins — {}", glyph::side_name(winner, style), win_reason_label(reason)),
1588	            side_color(winner),
1589	        ),
1590	        GameStatus::Drawn { reason } => (format!("Draw — {:?}", reason), Color::Gray),
1591	    }
1592	}
1593	
1594	fn line_label_value(label: &'static str, value: &str) -> Line<'static> {
1595	    Line::from(vec![
1596	        Span::styled(label, TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::DarkGray)),
1597	        Span::raw(" "),
1598	        Span::raw(value.to_string()),
1599	    ])
1600	}
1601	
1602	fn draw_rules_overlay(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect, _style: Style) {
1603	    // Center an overlay roughly 70 cols × 24 rows over the screen.
1604	    let pad_x = area.width.saturating_sub(72) / 2;
1605	    let pad_y = area.height.saturating_sub(26) / 2;
1606	    let overlay = Rect {
1607	        x: area.x + pad_x,
1608	        y: area.y + pad_y,
1609	        width: area.width.min(72),
1610	        height: area.height.min(26),
1611	    };
1612	    frame.render_widget(Clear, overlay);
1613	    let block =
1614	        Block::default().borders(Borders::ALL).title(" Rules / 規則 — press r or Esc to close ");
1615	    let lines: Vec<Line> = RULES_LINES
1616	        .iter()
1617	        .map(|(s, accent)| {
1618	            let style = if *accent {
1619	                TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow).add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD)
1620	            } else {
1621	                TuiStyle::default()
1622	            };
1623	            Line::from(Span::styled(*s, style))
1624	        })
1625	        .collect();
1626	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
1627	    frame.render_widget(para, overlay);
1628	}
1629	
1630	fn draw_quit_confirm_overlay(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {
1631	    // Small modal centered over the screen.
1632	    let w = 48u16;
1633	    let h = 7u16;
1634	    let pad_x = area.width.saturating_sub(w) / 2;
1635	    let pad_y = area.height.saturating_sub(h) / 2;
1636	    let overlay = Rect {
1637	        x: area.x + pad_x,
1638	        y: area.y + pad_y,
1639	        width: area.width.min(w),
1640	        height: area.height.min(h),
1641	    };
1642	    frame.render_widget(Clear, overlay);
1643	    let block = Block::default()
1644	        .borders(Borders::ALL)
1645	        .title(" Quit? ")
1646	        .border_style(TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Yellow));
1647	    let lines = vec![
1648	        Line::from(""),
1649	        Line::from(Span::styled(
1650	            "  End the in-progress game?",
1651	            TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
1652	        )),
1653	        Line::from(Span::styled(
1654	            "  Press y to quit, anything else to keep playing.",
1655	            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Gray),
1656	        )),
1657	    ];
1658	    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
1659	    frame.render_widget(para, overlay);
1660	}

1678	const RULES_LINES: &[(&str, bool)] = &[
1679	    ("Xiangqi 象棋", true),
1680	    ("", false),
1681	    ("• Red (帥仕相俥傌炮兵) moves first; Black (將士象車馬砲卒) replies.", false),
1682	    ("• General/Advisor stay inside the 3×3 palace (files d–f).", false),
1683	    ("• Elephants stay on their own side of the river (ranks 0–4 / 5–9).", false),
1684	    ("• Horses are blocked by 馬腿 — the orthogonal step in the move's direction.", false),
1685	    ("• Cannon non-capturing slide is like a chariot; capture requires jumping", false),
1686	    ("  exactly one piece (the screen 砲架) in a straight line.", false),
1687	    ("• Soldiers move forward one square; after crossing the river they can also", false),
1688	    ("  move sideways (but never backward).", false),
1689	    ("• Generals cannot face each other on a clear file (飛將 rule).", false),
1690	    ("• Standard: any move that leaves your general capturable is illegal.", false),
1691	    ("  Casual mode (--allow-self-check / picker entry) lifts that filter;", false),
1692	    ("  the game ends when the general is physically captured.", false),
1693	    ("", false),
1694	    ("Banqi 暗棋", true),
1695	    ("", false),
1696	    ("• 4×8 half-board, 32 pieces face-down. Pick a hidden piece to flip;", false),
1697	    ("  the FIRST flip locks the colors (flipper plays the revealed color).", false),
1698	    ("• Capture by piece rank: General > Advisor > Elephant > Chariot >", false),
1699	    ("  Horse > Cannon > Soldier. Soldier captures General (民推翻王).", false),
1700	    ("• Cannon captures by jumping over exactly one piece (any rank).", false),
1701	    ("• House rules (toggleable presets): chain-capture (連吃), chariot-rush", false),
```

```text
64	    /// ("graveyard"). Toggle in-game with `g`. Default `time`
65	    /// (chronological — useful for following 暗連 chains live).
66	    #[arg(long, value_enum, default_value_t = CapturedSortArg::Time)]
67	    captured_sort: CapturedSortArg,
68	
69	    /// Render from this side's perspective (debug; default RED). Ignored

72	    observer: SideArg,

74	    /// Connect to a chess-net-server instead of starting a local game.
75	    /// Example: --connect ws://127.0.0.1:7878 (the trailing /ws is added
76	    /// automatically if missing). Use ws://host/ws/<room-id> to target a
77	    /// specific room on a multi-room server; pair with --password if the
78	    /// room is locked.
79	    #[arg(long)]
80	    connect: Option<String>,
81	
82	    /// Open the lobby browser for the given chess-net server. Example:
83	    /// --lobby ws://127.0.0.1:7878 — picks a room from the live list (or
84	    /// creates one) instead of joining a fixed URL. Mutually exclusive
85	    /// with --connect; if both are provided, --lobby wins.
86	    #[arg(long)]
87	    lobby: Option<String>,
88	
89	    /// Password for password-locked rooms when paired with --connect. The
90	    /// in-TUI lobby browser prompts for the password directly, so this
91	    /// flag is mostly for scripted reconnects.
92	    #[arg(long)]
93	    password: Option<String>,
94	
95	    #[command(subcommand)]
96	    cmd: Option<Cmd>,
97	}

101	    /// Xiangqi (9×10). Casual rules by default — moves that leave your own
102	    /// general capturable are allowed; the game ends when the general is
103	    /// actually captured. Pass `--strict` for the standard self-check filter.
104	    Xiangqi {

106	        /// general in check are rejected.

109	    },

114	        preset: Option<PresetArg>,
115	        /// Comma-separated house rules: chain,dark,rush,horse-diagonal,cannon-fast.
116	        #[arg(long)]

125	enum StyleArg {
126	    Cjk,
127	    Ascii,
128	}
129	
130	#[derive(Copy, Clone, Debug, ValueEnum)]
131	enum SideArg {
132	    Red,
133	    Black,
134	}
135	
136	#[derive(Copy, Clone, Debug, ValueEnum)]
137	enum CapturedSortArg {
138	    Time,
139	    Rank,
140	}

149	fn main() -> Result<()> {
150	    let cli = Cli::parse();
151	
152	    let style = match cli.style {
153	        StyleArg::Cjk => Style::Cjk,
154	        StyleArg::Ascii => Style::Ascii,
155	    };
156	    let observer = match cli.observer {
157	        SideArg::Red => Side::RED,
158	        SideArg::Black => Side::BLACK,
159	    };
160	    let use_color = !cli.no_color;
161	
162	    let show_confetti = !cli.no_confetti;
163	    let show_check_banner = !cli.no_check_banner;
164	    let captured_sort = match cli.captured_sort {
165	        CapturedSortArg::Time => CapturedSort::Time,
166	        CapturedSortArg::Rank => CapturedSort::Rank,
167	    };
168	
169	    let mut app = if let Some(host) = cli.lobby.as_deref() {
170	        let url = normalize_lobby_url(host).map_err(|e| anyhow!(e))?;
171	        // Strip the /lobby suffix before storing as `host` so the lobby
172	        // can re-derive `/ws/<id>` for joins.
173	        let host = url.trim_end_matches("/lobby").to_string();
174	        AppState::new_lobby(host, style, use_color, observer)
175	    } else if let Some(url) = cli.connect.as_deref() {
176	        let mut url = normalize_connect_url(url).map_err(|e| anyhow!(e))?;
177	        if let Some(pw) = cli.password.as_deref() {
178	            let sep = if url.contains('?') { '&' } else { '?' };
179	            url = format!("{url}{sep}password={}", crate::url::urlencode(pw));
180	        }
181	        AppState::new_net(url, style, use_color)
182	    } else {
183	        match &cli.cmd {
184	            None => AppState::new_picker(style, use_color, observer),
185	            Some(Cmd::Xiangqi { strict }) => {
186	                let rules = if *strict { RuleSet::xiangqi() } else { RuleSet::xiangqi_casual() };
187	                AppState::new_game(rules, style, use_color, observer)
188	            }
189	            Some(Cmd::Banqi { preset, house, seed }) => {
190	                let rules = build_banqi_rules(preset.as_ref(), house.as_deref(), *seed)?;
191	                AppState::new_game(rules, style, use_color, observer)
192	            }
193	        }
194	    };
195	
196	    app.show_confetti = show_confetti;
197	    app.show_check_banner = show_check_banner;
198	    app.captured_sort = captured_sort;
199	    run(app)
200	}
201	
202	fn build_banqi_rules(
203	    preset: Option<&PresetArg>,
204	    house: Option<&str>,
205	    seed: Option<u64>,
206	) -> Result<RuleSet> {
207	    let mut flags = HouseRules::empty();
208	    if let Some(p) = preset {
209	        flags |= match p {
210	            PresetArg::Purist => chess_core::rules::PRESET_PURIST,
211	            PresetArg::Taiwan => chess_core::rules::PRESET_TAIWAN,
212	            PresetArg::Aggressive => chess_core::rules::PRESET_AGGRESSIVE,
213	        };
214	    }
215	    if let Some(s) = house {
216	        for tok in s.split(',') {
217	            flags |= match tok.trim() {
218	                "chain" => HouseRules::CHAIN_CAPTURE,
219	                "dark" | "dark-chain" | "dark-capture" => HouseRules::DARK_CAPTURE,
220	                "dark-trade" | "trade" => HouseRules::DARK_CAPTURE_TRADE,
221	                "rush" | "chariot-rush" => HouseRules::CHARIOT_RUSH,
222	                "horse" | "horse-diagonal" | "diag" => HouseRules::HORSE_DIAGONAL,
223	                "cannon-fast" | "fast-cannon" => HouseRules::CANNON_FAST_MOVE,
224	                other => return Err(anyhow!("unknown house rule: {other}")),
225	            };
226	        }
227	    }
228	    let flags = chess_core::rules::house::normalize(flags);
229	    Ok(match seed {
230	        Some(s) => RuleSet::banqi_with_seed(flags, s),
231	        None => RuleSet::banqi(flags),
232	    })
233	}
234	
235	fn run(mut app: AppState) -> Result<()> {
236	    let mut terminal = setup_terminal()?;
237	    let result = run_loop(&mut terminal, &mut app);
238	    teardown_terminal(&mut terminal).ok();
239	    result
240	}
241	
242	fn setup_terminal() -> Result<Terminal<CrosstermBackend<Stdout>>> {
243	    enable_raw_mode().context("enable raw mode")?;
244	    let mut stdout = io::stdout();
245	    execute!(stdout, EnterAlternateScreen, crossterm::event::EnableMouseCapture)
246	        .context("enter alt screen")?;
247	    let backend = CrosstermBackend::new(stdout);
248	    let terminal = Terminal::new(backend).context("init terminal")?;
249	    Ok(terminal)
250	}
251	
252	fn teardown_terminal(terminal: &mut Terminal<CrosstermBackend<Stdout>>) -> Result<()> {
253	    disable_raw_mode().ok();
254	    execute!(terminal.backend_mut(), LeaveAlternateScreen, crossterm::event::DisableMouseCapture)
255	        .ok();
256	    terminal.show_cursor().ok();
257	    Ok(())
258	}
259	
260	fn run_loop(terminal: &mut Terminal<CrosstermBackend<Stdout>>, app: &mut AppState) -> Result<()> {
261	    loop {
262	        // Drain ws events first so the next draw shows server-pushed state.
263	        // No-op outside Net mode.
264	        app.tick_net();
265	
266	        terminal.draw(|frame| ui::draw(frame, app))?;
267	        if app.should_quit {
268	            return Ok(());
269	        }
270	
271	        // Shorter poll in Net / Lobby modes keeps server pushes feeling
272	        // snappy (we redraw at most every poll interval). 200ms in
273	        // single-process modes is fine — no async source to drain. While
274	        // a confetti burst is active (or pending), drop to ~20fps so the
275	        // particles animate smoothly.
276	        let animating = app.confetti_anim.is_some() || app.confetti_pending;
277	        let poll_ms = if animating {
278	            50
279	        } else if matches!(app.screen, app::Screen::Net(_) | app::Screen::Lobby(_)) {
280	            60
281	        } else {
282	            200
283	        };
284	        if event::poll(Duration::from_millis(poll_ms))? {
285	            let mode = app.input_mode();
286	            let quit_confirm = app.quit_confirm_open;
287	            let action = match event::read()? {
288	                Event::Key(k) if k.kind == event::KeyEventKind::Press => {
289	                    from_key(k, mode, quit_confirm)
290	                }
291	                Event::Mouse(m) => from_mouse(m),
292	                Event::Resize(_, _) => Action::None,
293	                _ => Action::None,
294	            };
295	            app.dispatch(action);
296	        }
297	    }
298	}
299
```

 `./crates/chess-core/src/rules/house.rs`

```text
1	//! Banqi house rules.
2	//!
3	//! Five independent toggles + three named presets. See `docs/rules/banqi-house.md`.
4	
5	use bitflags::bitflags;
6	
7	bitflags! {
8	    /// Toggleable banqi house rules. Combine with `|`.
9	    #[derive(Copy, Clone, Eq, PartialEq, Debug, Default)]
10	    #[derive(serde::Serialize, serde::Deserialize)]
11	    pub struct HouseRules: u32 {
12	        /// 連吃 — chain captures along the same line.
13	        const CHAIN_CAPTURE       = 1 << 0;
14	        /// 暗吃 — atomic reveal+capture of a face-down piece (probe variant:
15	        /// rank-fail leaves both pieces in place with target now revealed).
16	        const DARK_CAPTURE        = 1 << 1;
17	        /// 車衝 — chariot moves multi-square in a line.
18	        const CHARIOT_RUSH        = 1 << 2;
19	        /// 馬斜 — horse adds 4 diagonal one-step moves; diagonal captures
20	        /// ignore rank (any piece).
21	        const HORSE_DIAGONAL      = 1 << 3;
22	        /// 炮快移 — cannon non-capturing move slides any distance.
23	        const CANNON_FAST_MOVE    = 1 << 4;
24	        /// 暗吃 trade variant — on rank-fail the small attacker dies (is
25	        /// removed), target stays revealed. Implies DARK_CAPTURE.
26	        const DARK_CAPTURE_TRADE  = 1 << 5;
27	    }
28	}
29	
30	/// Classic banqi, no house rules.
31	pub const PRESET_PURIST: HouseRules = HouseRules::empty();
32	
33	/// Common Taiwanese house ruleset: chain captures + chariot rush.
34	pub const PRESET_TAIWAN: HouseRules = HouseRules::CHAIN_CAPTURE.union(HouseRules::CHARIOT_RUSH);
35	
36	/// Aggressive ruleset enabling chain, dark-capture, chariot rush, horse
37	/// diagonal.
38	pub const PRESET_AGGRESSIVE: HouseRules = HouseRules::CHAIN_CAPTURE
39	    .union(HouseRules::DARK_CAPTURE)
40	    .union(HouseRules::CHARIOT_RUSH)
41	    .union(HouseRules::HORSE_DIAGONAL);
42	
43	/// `DARK_CAPTURE_TRADE` implies `DARK_CAPTURE`. Returns the canonical form.
44	pub fn normalize(mut rules: HouseRules) -> HouseRules {
45	    if rules.contains(HouseRules::DARK_CAPTURE_TRADE) {
46	        rules.insert(HouseRules::DARK_CAPTURE);
47	    }
48	    rules
49	}
50	
51	#[cfg(test)]
52	mod tests {
53	    use super::*;
54	
55	    #[test]
56	    fn presets_are_distinct() {
57	        assert_ne!(PRESET_PURIST, PRESET_TAIWAN);
58	        assert_ne!(PRESET_TAIWAN, PRESET_AGGRESSIVE);
59	        assert_ne!(PRESET_PURIST, PRESET_AGGRESSIVE);
60	    }
61	
62	    #[test]
63	    fn taiwan_preset_has_chain_and_rush() {
64	        assert!(PRESET_TAIWAN.contains(HouseRules::CHAIN_CAPTURE));
65	        assert!(PRESET_TAIWAN.contains(HouseRules::CHARIOT_RUSH));
66	        assert!(!PRESET_TAIWAN.contains(HouseRules::DARK_CAPTURE));
67	    }
68	
69	    #[test]
70	    fn dark_capture_trade_normalizes_to_include_dark_capture() {
71	        let r = normalize(HouseRules::DARK_CAPTURE_TRADE);
72	        assert!(r.contains(HouseRules::DARK_CAPTURE));
73	        assert!(r.contains(HouseRules::DARK_CAPTURE_TRADE));
74	    }
75	}
76
```

```text
1	//! Rules.
2	//!
3	//! `RuleSet` is plain data; move generation is free functions dispatching
4	//! on `Variant` and consulting `HouseRules` bitflags. See ADR-0003.
5	
6	pub mod banqi;
7	pub mod house;
8	pub mod three_kingdom;
9	pub mod xiangqi;
10	
11	pub use house::{HouseRules, PRESET_AGGRESSIVE, PRESET_PURIST, PRESET_TAIWAN};
12	
13	use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
14	
15	use crate::moves::MoveList;
16	use crate::state::GameState;
17	
18	#[derive(Copy, Clone, Eq, PartialEq, Debug, Serialize, Deserialize)]
19	pub enum Variant {
20	    Xiangqi,
21	    Banqi,
22	    /// 三國暗棋. Move-gen lands in PR 2; type exists from PR 1.
23	    ThreeKingdomBanqi,
24	}
25	
26	#[derive(Copy, Clone, Eq, PartialEq, Debug, Serialize, Deserialize)]
27	pub struct DrawPolicy {
28	    /// Plies without progress (capture/reveal) before a draw is forced.
29	    pub no_progress_plies: u16,
30	    /// How many position repetitions trigger a draw.
31	    pub repetition_threshold: u8,
32	}
33	
34	impl DrawPolicy {
35	    pub const XIANGQI: DrawPolicy = DrawPolicy { no_progress_plies: 60, repetition_threshold: 3 };
36	    pub const BANQI: DrawPolicy = DrawPolicy { no_progress_plies: 40, repetition_threshold: 3 };
37	}
38	
39	#[derive(Clone, Eq, PartialEq, Debug, Serialize, Deserialize)]
40	pub struct RuleSet {
41	    pub variant: Variant,
42	    pub house: HouseRules,
43	    pub draw_policy: DrawPolicy,
44	    /// Seed for banqi shuffling. `None` = nondeterministic.
45	    pub banqi_seed: Option<u64>,
46	    /// Casual / training mode for xiangqi: when true, the legality filter
47	    /// no longer rejects moves that leave the mover's own general in check.
48	    /// The game ends only when a general is actually captured
49	    /// (`WinReason::GeneralCaptured`). Default `false` (standard rules).
50	    /// `#[serde(default)]` keeps older snapshots loadable.
51	    #[serde(default)]
52	    pub xiangqi_allow_self_check: bool,
53	}
54	
55	impl RuleSet {
56	    pub fn xiangqi() -> Self {
57	        Self {
58	            variant: Variant::Xiangqi,
59	            house: HouseRules::empty(),
60	            draw_policy: DrawPolicy::XIANGQI,
61	            banqi_seed: None,
62	            xiangqi_allow_self_check: false,
63	        }
64	    }
65	
66	    /// Xiangqi without the self-check legality filter — moves that expose
67	    /// your own general are permitted; you lose when the general is actually
68	    /// captured. Useful for casual / "let me lose if I want" play.
69	    pub fn xiangqi_casual() -> Self {
70	        Self { xiangqi_allow_self_check: true, ..Self::xiangqi() }
71	    }
72	
73	    pub fn banqi(house: HouseRules) -> Self {
74	        Self {
75	            variant: Variant::Banqi,
76	            house,
77	            draw_policy: DrawPolicy::BANQI,
78	            banqi_seed: None,
79	            xiangqi_allow_self_check: false,
80	        }
81	    }
82	
83	    pub fn banqi_with_seed(house: HouseRules, seed: u64) -> Self {
84	        Self {
85	            variant: Variant::Banqi,
86	            house,
87	            draw_policy: DrawPolicy::BANQI,
88	            banqi_seed: Some(seed),
89	            xiangqi_allow_self_check: false,
90	        }
91	    }
92	
93	    pub fn three_kingdom() -> Self {
94	        Self {
95	            variant: Variant::ThreeKingdomBanqi,
96	            house: HouseRules::empty(),
97	            draw_policy: DrawPolicy::BANQI,
98	            banqi_seed: None,
99	            xiangqi_allow_self_check: false,
100	        }
101	    }
102	}
103	
104	/// Single dispatch point for move generation. Each variant's `generate`
105	/// fills `out` with all legal moves for the side to move.
106	pub fn generate_moves(state: &GameState, out: &mut MoveList) {
107	    match state.rules.variant {
108	        Variant::Xiangqi => xiangqi::generate(state, out),
109	        Variant::Banqi => banqi::generate(state, out),
110	        Variant::ThreeKingdomBanqi => three_kingdom::generate(state, out),
111	    }
112	}
113	
114	#[cfg(test)]
115	mod tests {
116	    use super::*;
117	
118	    #[test]
119	    fn xiangqi_ruleset_defaults() {
120	        let r = RuleSet::xiangqi();
121	        assert_eq!(r.variant, Variant::Xiangqi);
122	        assert!(r.house.is_empty());
123	        assert_eq!(r.draw_policy.no_progress_plies, 60);
124	    }
125	
126	    #[test]
127	    fn banqi_ruleset_carries_house_rules() {
128	        let r = RuleSet::banqi(HouseRules::CHAIN_CAPTURE | HouseRules::CHARIOT_RUSH);
129	        assert!(r.house.contains(HouseRules::CHAIN_CAPTURE));
130	        assert!(r.house.contains(HouseRules::CHARIOT_RUSH));
131	        assert!(!r.house.contains(HouseRules::DARK_CAPTURE));
132	    }
133	
134	    #[test]
135	    fn banqi_ruleset_with_seed() {
136	        let r = RuleSet::banqi_with_seed(HouseRules::empty(), 42);
137	        assert_eq!(r.banqi_seed, Some(42));
138	    }
139	}
```

- 新增 `PickerEntry::CustomXiangqi` / `CustomBanqi` (label `"… custom rules…"`),`PickerEntry::ALL` 從 7→9
- 新增 `CustomVariant`、`BanqiPreset`、`CustomRulesItem` enums + `CustomRulesView` 結構 + `CUSTOM_BANQI_FLAGS` 6 行對照表 (token + 中文)
- 新增 `Screen::CustomRules(Box<CustomRulesView>)`
- 新增 `dispatch_custom_rules()`:Up/Down 巡覽 items,Enter/Space 觸發 (Preset 切換 / Flag toggle 後自動把 preset 改成 `Custom` / Start 建 `RuleSet` 開局),seed 編輯走 `dispatch_text` 的 digit-only 分支
- `dispatch_back` 回 picker 時還原游標位置

`clients/chess-tui/src/input.rs`
- 新 `InputMode::CustomRules`:k/j/↑↓ 移動,Enter/Space activate,Backspace + 數字鍵編輯 seed,Esc 返回

`clients/chess-tui/src/ui.rs`
- 新 `draw_custom_rules`:標題 + Preset 區 (radio `(•)/( )`) + House rules 區 (`[x]/[ ]` + 中文) + Seed 輸入框 + `[ Start ]` 按鈕 + 錯誤訊息行 + 底部說明
- `draw_rules_overlay` 改吃 `Option<&RuleSet>`,前置 `current_rules_lines()` 區塊:xiangqi 顯示 Standard/Casual,banqi 顯示 6 條 `[x]/[ ]` 旗標 + 中文 + Seed (`42 (deterministic)` 或 `— (random)`)
- `active_rules(&Screen)` helper:Game→`g.state.rules`,Net→`n.rules`,其他 None

**操作流:** Picker 選 `Banqi (暗棋) — custom rules…` → 子畫面用 j/k 移動,Space 切換 chain/dark/rush/horse/cannon/dark-trade,游標到 Seed 行打 `42`,移到 `[ Start ]` 按 Enter → 進遊戲後按 `r` 看到當前規則勾選狀態 + Seed:42。
